items.title: Court Of Appeal, April 14, 2026, Order On Suspensive Effect, UPC_CoA_48/2026
items.title_zh: UPC上诉法院：UPCA第74条优先，可授予暂停执行效力
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal: Article 74 UPCA Prevails, Allowing Suspensive Effect Under Rule 220.2
items.summary: The Court of Appeal can grant suspensive effect to an order pursuant to R. 220.2 RoP as Art. 74 UPCA prevails over R. 223.5 RoP.
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC上诉法院在UPC_CoA_48/2026案中裁定，当《统一专利法院协定》(UPCA)与《程序规则》(RoP)冲突时，UPCA第74条优先，法院可依RoP 220.2条授予暂停执行效力。仅在“特殊情况”下（如命令明显错误、不可逆后果或基本程序权受损）才予批准。保证金通常被视为可逆，故难满足条件。申请人仅以中小企业身份主张无力支付保证金无效，需提供具体证据。此类裁定非最终决定，不涉及费用裁决。
items.ai_summary_en: In case UPC_CoA_48/2026, the UPC Court of Appeal ruled that Article 74 of the Unified Patent Court Agreement (UPCA) takes precedence over Rule 223.5 of the Rules of Procedure (RoP). Consequently, the Court may grant suspensive effect to an order under Rule 220.2 RoP despite conflicting procedural rules. Such relief is granted only in exceptional circumstances, including manifestly erroneous orders, irreversible consequences, or violations of fundamental procedural rights. The Court noted that security deposits are generally reversible via reimbursement, making it difficult to meet the irreversibility threshold. Mere reference to SME status is insufficient to prove financial inability to provide security; specific evidence is required. As this order is not a final decision concluding the action, no costs were awarded.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在UPC诉讼中若面临不利临时措施，申请暂停执行难度极大。需重点论证“不可逆后果”或“明显法律错误”，而非仅依赖财务困难。应提前准备详尽的财务证据以应对保证金要求，并密切关注UPC对程序规则的严格解释，避免程序性失误导致权益受损。
items.ai_insight_en: Parties facing adverse interim measures at the UPC face significant hurdles in obtaining suspensive effect. Arguments must focus on demonstrating irreversible consequences or manifest legal errors rather than relying solely on financial hardship. When responding to security for costs orders, litigants should prepare detailed financial documentation to substantiate claims of inability to pay, as generic references to company size are inadequate. Practitioners must closely monitor the UPC’s strict interpretation of procedural rules regarding suspensive effects to avoid procedural pitfalls that could compromise their strategic position during litigation.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPCA第74条优先于RoP 223.5，允许法院依RoP 220.2授予暂停执行效力", "暂停执行仅限特殊情况，如命令明显错误或造成不可逆后果，保证金通常可逆", "主张无力提供保证金需具体证据，仅引用中小企业身份不足；裁定不涉费用"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Article 74 UPCA prevails over Rule 223.5 RoP, empowering the Court to grant suspensive effect under Rule 220.2.", "Suspensive effect requires exceptional circumstances like manifest error or irreversible harm; security deposits are typically reversible.", "Proving financial inability demands specific evidence beyond SME status claims, and such interim orders exclude cost decisions."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["论证暂停执行需聚焦不可逆后果或明显错误，财务困难证明门槛极高", "应对保证金要求需提交具体财务证据，不能仅凭中小企业身份抗辩"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Demonstrating 'irreversible consequences' is critical for suspensive effect; financial difficulty alone rarely suffices.", "Practice note: Substantiate financial inability with concrete evidence when challenging security for costs orders.", "What to monitor: Strict judicial interpretation of 'exceptional circumstances' under Rule 220.2 and Rule 223.5 interplay."]
core_points_en: Article 74 UPCA prevails over Rule 223.5 RoP, empowering the Court to grant suspensive effect under Rule 220.2.
Suspensive effect requires exceptional circumstances like manifest error or irreversible harm; security deposits are typically reversible.
Proving financial inability demands specific evidence beyond SME status claims, and such interim orders exclude cost decisions.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Demonstrating 'irreversible consequences' is critical for suspensive effect; financial difficulty alone rarely suffices.
Practice note: Substantiate financial inability with concrete evidence when challenging security for costs orders.
What to monitor: Strict judicial interpretation of 'exceptional circumstances' under Rule 220.2 and Rule 223.5 interplay.

items.title: UPC Court of Appeal: Accuracy of Ex Parte Applications
items.title_zh: UPC 上诉院：单方申请须确保事实披露准确完整
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal: Strict Duty of Full Disclosure in Ex Parte Applications
items.summary: In its March 2026 order in Ecovacs v Roborock, the Court of Appeal upheld the revocation of an ex parte inspection order on the basis...
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC 上诉院在 Ecovacs 诉 Roborock 案中维持撤销单方检查令。法院认定申请人未遵守程序规则 192.3，未履行披露可能影响法院决定的重大事实义务。法院强调单方程序中申请人负有更高披露要求，申请时的遗漏或歪曲无法通过后续提交补救，事后补充理由不予采信，确立了严格的程序合规标准。
items.ai_summary_en: In its March 2026 order in Ecovacs v Roborock, the UPC Court of Appeal upheld the revocation of an ex parte inspection order. The Court found that the applicant failed to comply with Rule 192.3 of the Rules of Procedure, which mandates the disclosure of any material fact potentially influencing the Court’s decision to grant relief without hearing the defendant. Emphasizing the heightened duty of candor inherent in ex parte proceedings, where judges rely exclusively on the applicant’s submissions, the Court ruled that omissions or distorted accounts cannot be remedied post-grant. Subsequent attempts to supply missing facts or alternative justifications via a Request for Review are disregarded. This judgment establishes a strict procedural standard: initial applications must contain complete and accurate disclosure at the time of filing, as later corrections cannot validate a deficient application.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在 UPC 提起单方申请时，务必确保首次提交材料的完整性与真实性。任何关键事实的遗漏或表述不成都可能导致命令被撤销且无法挽回，需建立严格的内部合规审查机制以应对高标准程序要求。
items.ai_insight_en: This ruling underscores the critical importance of rigorous internal compliance when seeking provisional measures under the UPC framework. Legal teams must ensure that factual narratives in ex parte applications are fully consistent with those presented in main proceedings. Any discrepancy or omission risks immediate revocation of orders, with no opportunity for retroactive justification. Practitioners should implement robust verification protocols to confirm that all known material facts are disclosed upfront. Reliance on later submissions to patch initial gaps is no longer viable, making the accuracy of the first filing decisive for the success of urgent interim relief strategies.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["单方申请必须全面、准确披露所有重大事实，否则命令将被撤销", "申请时的披露缺陷无法通过后续审查请求中的补充材料进行补救", "法院重申单方程序中申请人承担完全依赖其陈述的更高举证责任"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Ex parte applications require full, correct, and complete disclosure of all material facts at the moment of filing to avoid revocation.", "Deficiencies in initial disclosure cannot be cured by subsequent submissions or additional grounds raised during a review request.", "Applicants bear a heightened burden of candor in ex parte proceedings, as courts rely solely on their unilateral representations."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["单方申请首份文件决定成败，严禁依赖事后补充来修补事实漏洞", "企业需强化内部事实核查流程，确保披露内容与主案陈述高度一致"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Ensure absolute consistency between ex parte application facts and main case pleadings to prevent irreversible order revocation.", "Practice note: Implement strict pre-filing checks to verify full disclosure of all material facts, avoiding reliance on post-grant remedies.", "What to monitor: Future UPC decisions clarifying the scope of 'material facts' and the threshold for 'distorted accounts' in ex parte contexts."]
core_points_en: Ex parte applications require full, correct, and complete disclosure of all material facts at the moment of filing to avoid revocation.
Deficiencies in initial disclosure cannot be cured by subsequent submissions or additional grounds raised during a review request.
Applicants bear a heightened burden of candor in ex parte proceedings, as courts rely solely on their unilateral representations.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Ensure absolute consistency between ex parte application facts and main case pleadings to prevent irreversible order revocation.
Practice note: Implement strict pre-filing checks to verify full disclosure of all material facts, avoiding reliance on post-grant remedies.
What to monitor: Future UPC decisions clarifying the scope of 'material facts' and the threshold for 'distorted accounts' in ex parte contexts.

items.title: UPC Orders Infringer to Publish Decision on their Website
items.title_zh: UPC 责令侵权方在其官网发布法院判决摘要
items.title_en: UPC Düsseldorf Orders Infringer to Publish Judgment on Website to Correct Misleading Public Statements
items.summary: A recent decision handed down by the Düsseldorf Local Division in UPC_CFI_351/2024 underscores the Unified Patent Court's authority to...
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC 杜塞尔多夫分院在案件中裁定，被告利用官网误导公众其产品未侵权。依据 UPCA 第 80 条，法院除允许原告在行业期刊发布判决外，更责令被告在其官网首页发布判决主文一个月。此举旨在纠正被告制造的虚假印象，确保其约八千名客户获知侵权事实，彰显了 UPC 强制透明度的权威。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court’s Düsseldorf Local Division exercised its authority under Article 80 of the UPC Agreement in case UPC_CFI_351/2024. The Court ordered defendants to publish the operative part of the infringement judgment on their corporate websites for one month. This measure addressed false impressions created by the defendants’ prior public statements claiming their products were non-infringing. While the claimant was permitted to publish the decision in five industry journals, the Court deemed direct rectification necessary to correct the market misconception. The order ensures that approximately 8,000 customers supplied by the defendants are accurately informed of the infringement finding. This ruling highlights the UPC's power to mandate transparency and impose restorative measures at the infringer's expense when public communications distort the reality of ongoing legal disputes.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧应诉时需谨言慎行，避免在官网或公关稿中过早断言不侵权。若败诉，可能面临被强制在自有渠道公示判决的风险，这将严重损害商业信誉并波及现有客户群，需提前评估舆情应对方案。
items.ai_insight_en: Litigants before the Unified Patent Court should carefully manage public communications regarding disputed products. Asserting non-infringement or product legality on corporate websites or in press releases carries significant risk if the court later rules against the defendant. A successful plaintiff may seek orders requiring the losing party to publish the judgment on their own digital platforms to correct the record. Such measures can severely impact commercial reputation and customer relationships. Parties should integrate potential 'mandatory publication' remedies into their litigation risk assessments and prepare crisis communication strategies to mitigate reputational damage if adverse rulings occur.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["法院依据 UPCA 第 80 条行使裁量权，责令侵权方自费发布信息", "被告因在官网宣称产品合法而被判需在同一平台发布判决主文", "该救济措施旨在直接消除被告误导公众造成的错误市场认知"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The Court invoked Article 80 UPCA to order the infringer to bear costs for disseminating information regarding the final decision.", "Defendants were required to publish the judgment's operative part on their own websites to counteract prior claims of product legality.", "This restorative remedy aims to directly eliminate erroneous market perceptions caused by the defendant's misleading public statements."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["慎用企业官网发布涉诉产品合法性声明，以免败诉后遭反制", "需将“强制公示判决”纳入诉讼风险评估，制定危机公关预案"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Avoid premature public assertions of non-infringement on corporate channels to prevent liability for corrective publication orders upon defeat.", "Practice note: Include mandatory publication risks in litigation strategy and prepare crisis PR plans to address potential reputational harm from adverse judgments.", "What to monitor: How the UPC applies Article 80 UPCA in future cases involving defendants who actively shape public perception during pending proceedings."]
core_points_en: The Court invoked Article 80 UPCA to order the infringer to bear costs for disseminating information regarding the final decision.
Defendants were required to publish the judgment's operative part on their own websites to counteract prior claims of product legality.
This restorative remedy aims to directly eliminate erroneous market perceptions caused by the defendant's misleading public statements.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Avoid premature public assertions of non-infringement on corporate channels to prevent liability for corrective publication orders upon defeat.
Practice note: Include mandatory publication risks in litigation strategy and prepare crisis PR plans to address potential reputational harm from adverse judgments.
What to monitor: How the UPC applies Article 80 UPCA in future cases involving defendants who actively shape public perception during pending proceedings.

items.title: Rolls-Royce tops UK’s most iconic British brands list, reveals UKIPO
items.title_zh: 劳斯莱斯领衔英国最具标志性品牌榜单
items.title_en: UKIPO Reveals Rolls-Royce as Top Iconic British Brand in 150th Anniversary Poll
items.summary: The luxury car brand is joined by the likes of Twinings, Burberry, Calpol, Mini and the BBC, in a poll to celebrate the 150-year anniversary of trademark registration in the UK.
items.ai_summary_zh: 为庆祝英国商标注册制度建立 150 周年，英国知识产权局（UKIPO）公布了一项民意调查结果。豪华汽车品牌劳斯莱斯荣登“英国最具标志性品牌”榜首，与川宁、博柏利、Calpol、Mini 及英国广播公司（BBC）等知名品牌共同入选。该活动旨在回顾并彰显商标在英国商业历史与文化传承中的核心价值。
items.ai_summary_en: To commemorate the 150th anniversary of the UK trademark registration system, the UK Intellectual Property Office (UKIPO) has released the results of a public poll identifying the nation's most iconic brands. The luxury automotive manufacturer Rolls-Royce secured the top position on this prestigious list. It is joined by other enduring household names such as Twinings, Burberry, Calpol, Mini, and the BBC. This initiative highlights the significant role trademarks play in British commercial history and cultural heritage. By recognizing these long-standing entities, the UKIPO underscores the value of brand identity and consumer trust accumulated over decades. The list serves as a testament to how registered marks contribute to national identity and economic stability, offering a historical perspective on brand longevity and recognition within the United Kingdom’s competitive marketplace.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，英国后续是否会围绕这类官方动向给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This milestone highlights the strategic importance of long-term brand stewardship and reputation management in mature markets. For rights holders, maintaining iconic status requires consistent quality, cultural relevance, and robust legal protection over extended periods. Companies should view trademarks not merely as legal assets but as core components of corporate heritage and consumer trust. In jurisdictions like the UK, where brand history significantly influences market perception, integrating legal strategies with narrative building enhances resilience against competition. Understanding how established brands leverage their legacy can inform approaches to brand positioning, ensuring that intellectual property portfolios support both immediate commercial goals and long-term cultural capital accumulation.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["劳斯莱斯获评英国最具标志性品牌第一名", "UKIPO 发布榜单庆祝商标注册 150 周年", "川宁、博柏利等经典品牌共同入选名单"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Rolls-Royce was voted the number one most iconic British brand in a recent public poll conducted by the UK Intellectual Property Office.", "The UKIPO released this ranking to celebrate the 150th anniversary of the establishment of the trademark registration system in the United Kingdom.", "Other classic brands including Twinings, Burberry, Calpol, Mini, and the BBC were also selected for inclusion in the distinguished list."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["借鉴百年品牌建设经验，深化品牌文化内涵", "重视商标在英国市场的长期声誉积累与维护"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Leverage historical brand narratives to strengthen market positioning and consumer loyalty in established European markets.", "Practice note: Integrate trademark registration strategies with long-term brand storytelling to enhance asset value and cultural resonance.", "What to monitor: Observe how legacy brands maintain relevance and protect their reputations amidst evolving consumer expectations and digital challenges."]
core_points_en: Rolls-Royce was voted the number one most iconic British brand in a recent public poll conducted by the UK Intellectual Property Office.
The UKIPO released this ranking to celebrate the 150th anniversary of the establishment of the trademark registration system in the United Kingdom.
Other classic brands including Twinings, Burberry, Calpol, Mini, and the BBC were also selected for inclusion in the distinguished list.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Leverage historical brand narratives to strengthen market positioning and consumer loyalty in established European markets.
Practice note: Integrate trademark registration strategies with long-term brand storytelling to enhance asset value and cultural resonance.
What to monitor: Observe how legacy brands maintain relevance and protect their reputations amidst evolving consumer expectations and digital challenges.

items.title: Law and practice snippets: April 2026
items.title_zh: UKIPO发布数字设计审查新指南并上调官费
items.title_en: UK IPO Raises Fees by 25% and Issues New Guidance on Digital Design Registration
items.summary: An update on recent practice points by our Law and Practice Committee, including a new Designs Practice Notice, certificate issuance and tribunal timescales.
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国知识产权局（UKIPO）于2026年4月1日实施平均25%的官费上调，商标申请及续展费用均有增加。同时发布DPN 01/26号外观设计实践通知，明确图标、GUI及网页等数字设计的审查标准，特别规范含动画或运动元素的设计视图提交要求，强调单一整体印象及免责声明的作用，旨在提升注册清晰度与确定性。
items.ai_summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office implemented a significant fee increase effective 1 April 2026, raising average costs by approximately 25%. Concurrently, the office published Designs Practice Notice (DPN) 01/26, providing updated examination guidelines for registered designs covering icons, graphical user interfaces (GUIs), web pages, and other digital assets. This notice specifically clarifies procedures for designs featuring animation or movement, detailing how to submit multiple views for both static and animated elements. It emphasizes the necessity of clear product indications and explains the strategic role of written disclaimers in defining scope. These measures aim to ensure that each registered design presents a single, unitary overall impression, thereby enhancing legal certainty and registration clarity for digital intellectual property rights holders operating within the UK jurisdiction.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国科技企业出口英国需关注GUI及动态外观设计合规成本上升。建议提前优化设计视图布局，利用免责声明规避非保护部分争议，以应对更严格的审查标准。同时需预算调整，评估官费上涨对海外IP组合维护的影响，确保持续竞争力。
items.ai_insight_en: Rights holders managing UK portfolios should anticipate higher maintenance costs due to the recent fee adjustments. For digital sectors, compliance with DPN 01/26 requires careful preparation of representation files, particularly for animated GUIs. Strategic use of disclaimers can help isolate protectable elements from functional ones, reducing examination objections. Teams should review existing applications for alignment with the new guidance to avoid delays or refusals. Proactive budgeting for increased official fees and rigorous pre-filing checks on visual representations will be essential for maintaining robust design protection and operational efficiency in the UK market.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UKIPO自2026年4月1日起实施平均25%官费上调，商标在线申请增至205英镑", "发布DPN 01/26指南，细化图标、GUI及含动画数字外观设计的视图提交规范", "强调通过多视图展示静态与动态设计，确保注册体现单一整体印象"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Effective 1 April 2026, UK IPO fees increased by an average of 25%, with online trademark application costs rising to £205 per class.", "Designs Practice Notice 01/26 establishes specific examination standards for digital designs, including icons, GUIs, and animated interfaces.", "Applicants must use multiple views to demonstrate static and dynamic features, ensuring a single overall impression is clearly shown."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["优化GUI及动态设计视图，利用免责声明规避审查风险", "评估官费上涨影响，调整英国IP组合维护预算策略"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Budget for 25% fee increases and adjust UK IP portfolio maintenance strategies accordingly.", "Practice note: Optimize GUI and animated design views using disclaimers to mitigate examination risks under DPN 01/26.", "What to monitor: Immediate implementation of new digital design examination practices affecting icons and web interfaces."]
core_points_en: Effective 1 April 2026, UK IPO fees increased by an average of 25%, with online trademark application costs rising to £205 per class.
Designs Practice Notice 01/26 establishes specific examination standards for digital designs, including icons, GUIs, and animated interfaces.
Applicants must use multiple views to demonstrate static and dynamic features, ensuring a single overall impression is clearly shown.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Budget for 25% fee increases and adjust UK IP portfolio maintenance strategies accordingly.
Practice note: Optimize GUI and animated design views using disclaimers to mitigate examination risks under DPN 01/26.
What to monitor: Immediate implementation of new digital design examination practices affecting icons and web interfaces.

items.title: The UK IPO issues new Designs Practice Notice
items.title_zh: 英国知识产权局发布数字外观设计审查新指南
items.title_en: UK IPO Issues New Guidance on Digital Design Registration and Examination
items.summary: The UK Intellectual Property Office (UK IPO) has issued new guidance on protecting digital designs, including graphical user interfaces (GUIs), webpages and graphic symbols/icons.
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国知识产权局（UK IPO）发布首份2024年外观设计实践通知（DPN 01/26），旨在澄清图形用户界面、网页及图标等数字外观设计的审查标准。鉴于此类申请量上升，新规强调注册簿需清晰无歧义地展示设计整体印象。指南详细规定了静态与动态设计的提交要求，允许使用最多12个视图展示动画序列，并明确了书面免责声明在界定保护范围时的作用，若解释过于复杂可能引发异议。
items.ai_summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has published Designs Practice Notice 01/26, its first such guidance since 2024. This update addresses the rising volume of applications for digital designs, including graphical user interfaces, webpages, and icons. The notice clarifies examination standards, emphasizing that the register must clearly and unambiguously convey the design's overall impression. It provides detailed protocols for submitting both static and moving designs, specifically permitting up to twelve views to illustrate animation sequences effectively. Furthermore, the guidance confirms the validity of written disclaimers for defining protection scope, provided they are clear and correspond to the visual representations. Complex interpretations may trigger objections, ensuring legal certainty for stakeholders navigating the evolving landscape of digital intellectual property rights in the United Kingdom.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国科技企业出口英国时，应严格遵循新指南优化GUI及UI设计的外观专利申请策略。建议充分利用12个视图上限完整呈现动态交互效果，确保视觉表达清晰无歧义。同时，谨慎使用免责声明，避免因表述模糊导致审查异议，以保障数字资产在英国市场的知识产权保护强度与稳定性。
items.ai_insight_en: This practice notice significantly impacts how digital assets are protected in the UK market. Stakeholders should optimize their filing strategies by maximizing the use of multiple views to accurately capture dynamic interactions within GUIs. Clear visual representation is critical to meeting the 'overall impression' standard. Additionally, while disclaimers remain a useful tool for scope definition, they must be drafted with precision to prevent examination delays. Legal teams should review existing portfolios against these new standards to ensure compliance and maintain robust protection for digital interface elements against potential infringement or invalidity challenges.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UK IPO发布DPN 01/26，明确GUI及数字外观设计的审查原则与整体印象标准", "规范动态设计提交，允许使用最多12个视图清晰展示动画 progression", "确认书面免责声明的效力，但要求清晰易懂，避免过度复杂的解释需求"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["DPN 01/26 establishes clear examination principles for GUIs and digital designs, requiring the register to show the overall impression without ambiguity.", "Dynamic design submissions are regulated, allowing applicants to use up to twelve views to clearly demonstrate the progression of animations.", "Written disclaimers are accepted for defining protection scope but must be clear and understandable to avoid objections based on complex interpretation."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["优化GUI专利视图提交策略，利用多视图清晰呈现动态交互细节", "审慎使用免责声明，确保界定清晰以避免因解释复杂引发的审查异议"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Optimize GUI and UI design filings by utilizing the maximum view allowance to clearly depict dynamic interactions and meet clarity standards.", "Practice note: Draft written disclaimers with extreme precision to define protection scope, avoiding ambiguous language that could necessitate complex interpretation.", "What to monitor: Monitor UKIPO examination trends regarding digital design representations to adapt filing strategies for emerging interactive technologies."]
core_points_en: DPN 01/26 establishes clear examination principles for GUIs and digital designs, requiring the register to show the overall impression without ambiguity.
Dynamic design submissions are regulated, allowing applicants to use up to twelve views to clearly demonstrate the progression of animations.
Written disclaimers are accepted for defining protection scope but must be clear and understandable to avoid objections based on complex interpretation.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Optimize GUI and UI design filings by utilizing the maximum view allowance to clearly depict dynamic interactions and meet clarity standards.
Practice note: Draft written disclaimers with extreme precision to define protection scope, avoiding ambiguous language that could necessitate complex interpretation.
What to monitor: Monitor UKIPO examination trends regarding digital design representations to adapt filing strategies for emerging interactive technologies.

items.title: Hamburg Local Division clarifies universal jurisdiction under Art. 4 Brussels I Recast
items.title_zh: UPC 汉堡分部澄清布鲁塞尔条例下的普遍管辖权
items.title_en: Hamburg Division Confirms UPC Universal Jurisdiction Under Brussels I Recast While Limiting Co-Defendant Claims for UK Acts
items.summary: Dyson v Dreame – Hamburg Local Division, 7 April 2026
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC 汉堡分部在戴森诉追觅案中裁定，对住所地在成员国的被告拥有普遍管辖权，涵盖西班牙等非 UPC 区及英国侵权。但法院限制了共同被告管辖权，认为欧盟授权代表不足以作为锚定被告追究英国分销商责任，最终驳回针对英国的禁令请求。
items.ai_summary_en: In Dyson v Dreame, the Hamburg Local Division granted a preliminary injunction for EP 3 119 235, confirming that the Unified Patent Court exercises universal jurisdiction under Article 4 of the Brussels I Recast Regulation against defendants domiciled in UPC Member States. This jurisdiction extends to infringements occurring in non-UPC territories, including Spain and the United Kingdom. However, the Court significantly restricted the application of Article 8(1) regarding co-defendants. It accepted jurisdiction over a non-EU defendant for Spanish acts based on a close connection with a Dutch importer. Conversely, it refused relief for the UK, ruling that an EU Authorized Representative could not serve as an anchor defendant for a UK distributor. The regulatory overlap in Northern Ireland was deemed insufficient to establish the necessary foreseeability for joint liability.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业需警惕 UPC 普遍管辖权带来的跨境诉讼风险，即便在非 UPC 国家也可能被卷入。同时，单纯设立欧盟代表处未必能覆盖英国法律责任，应针对英欧市场分别构建合规与抗辩体系，避免管辖连接点误判。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision clarifies the scope of UPC jurisdiction, confirming broad reach for defendants domiciled within the Unitary Patent system while imposing stricter limits on extending claims to third parties via co-defendant rules. For rights holders and alleged infringers operating across Europe, this means that establishing a local entity in a UPC state exposes global operations within the treaty area to unified proceedings. However, relying on standard EU regulatory roles, such as Authorized Representatives, does not automatically create jurisdictional links for non-participating states like the UK. Companies must carefully structure their European supply chains and legal entities to manage litigation risks, ensuring distinct compliance and defense strategies for UPC member states versus non-member jurisdictions to avoid unintended jurisdictional exposure.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["确认 UPC 对成员国被告拥有涵盖非 UPC 领土的普遍管辖权", "限制共同被告管辖权，要求侵权行为关联具有合理可预见性", "欧盟授权代表角色不足以构成英国法下的共同侵权或中间人责任"]

items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用普遍管辖权规则评估在欧整体诉讼风险敞口", "区分英欧法律主体角色，避免单一架构导致责任落空"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Assess litigation risk exposure for entities domiciled in UPC states, recognizing that universal jurisdiction may cover acts in non-UPC countries like Spain and…", "Practice note: Do not assume that appointing an EU Authorized Representative creates sufficient legal connection to anchor jurisdiction against separate UK distributors or affilia…", "What to monitor: Future applications of Article 8(1) foreseeability standards by UPC divisions when determining if cross-border corporate structures justify consolidated infringem…"]

items.title: LD Düsseldorf, April 10, 2026, Order, UPC_CFI_1110/2025 And UPC_CFI_1111/2025
items.title_zh: UPC杜塞尔多夫分院：初审判决被推翻后已付费用可追回
items.title_en: UPC Düsseldorf: Costs Paid Under Overturned First-Instance Decision Are Recoverable
items.summary: Costs paid under a first-instance decision are recoverable if that decision is overturned on appeal. The appeal’s outcome invalidates the initial cost order (Rule 151 RoP).
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）杜塞尔多夫地方法院在Seoul Viosys案中裁定，若初审判决在上诉中被推翻，依据程序规则第151条，基于该判决产生的初始费用命令失效，已支付费用可在后续程序中追回。法院明确指出，初审阶段达成的费用协议不自动延伸至上诉阶段，因为上诉成本需单独评估其合理性与比例性。此裁决明确了UPC诉讼中费用承担的法律基础随主判决变动而变动的原则，对当事人管理诉讼预算及风险评估具有重要指导意义。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court (UPC) Local Division in Düsseldorf ruled in the Seoul Viosys case that costs paid pursuant to a first-instance decision are recoverable if that decision is subsequently overturned on appeal. Citing Rule 151 of the Rules of Procedure, the Court held that the reversal of the main judgment invalidates the legal basis for the initial cost order, thereby allowing previously paid amounts to be reclaimed in subsequent proceedings. Furthermore, the Court clarified that a cost agreement concluded for the first instance does not automatically extend to the appeal stage. Appeal costs must be assessed separately based on reasonableness and proportionality under Article 69 of the UPC Agreement, as the original agreement was grounded in first-instance estimates where an appeal was not foreseeable.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在参与UPC诉讼时，应严格区分初审与上诉阶段的费用预算，避免默认费用协议覆盖全程。鉴于败诉方可能通过上诉逆转费用责任，企业需动态调整诉讼策略，并在和解谈判中明确费用条款的适用范围，以控制跨境知识产权纠纷的整体财务风险。
items.ai_insight_en: Parties involved in UPC litigation should strictly differentiate between budget allocations for first-instance and appeal stages, avoiding assumptions that initial cost agreements cover the entire dispute lifecycle. Given that a losing party may reverse cost liabilities through a successful appeal, litigation strategies must remain dynamic. Legal teams should explicitly define the scope of cost provisions in settlement negotiations to mitigate financial exposure. This approach ensures better control over overall costs in cross-border intellectual property disputes, aligning risk management with the procedural realities of the new court system.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["初审判决被上诉推翻后，原费用命令失效，已付费用具备可追回性", "初审费用协议不自动涵盖上诉阶段，上诉费用需单独评估合理性", "法律依据为《统一专利法院协定》第69条及程序规则第151条"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Costs paid under a first-instance decision become recoverable if that decision is overturned on appeal, as the reversal removes the legal basis for the initial cost order.", "A cost agreement reached during the first instance does not automatically cover the appeal stage, requiring separate assessment of appeal costs for reasonableness and proportional…", "The legal basis for these determinations is found in Article 69 of the UPC Agreement and Rules 150, 151, and 152 of the Rules of Procedure."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["严格区分初审与上诉费用预算，避免协议范围误判", "动态调整策略，关注上诉对费用责任的逆转影响"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Strictly separate first-instance and appeal cost budgets to prevent misjudgment of agreement scopes and unexpected financial liabilities.", "Practice note: Dynamically adjust litigation strategies by monitoring how appeals can reverse cost responsibilities, ensuring flexible resource allocation.", "What to monitor: Explicitly clarify the applicability of cost terms in settlement negotiations to effectively manage cross-border IP dispute risks."]
core_points_en: Costs paid under a first-instance decision become recoverable if that decision is overturned on appeal, as the reversal removes the legal basis for the initial cost order.
A cost agreement reached during the first instance does not automatically cover the appeal stage, requiring separate assessment of appeal costs for reasonableness and proportional…
The legal basis for these determinations is found in Article 69 of the UPC Agreement and Rules 150, 151, and 152 of the Rules of Procedure.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Strictly separate first-instance and appeal cost budgets to prevent misjudgment of agreement scopes and unexpected financial liabilities.
Practice note: Dynamically adjust litigation strategies by monitoring how appeals can reverse cost responsibilities, ensuring flexible resource allocation.
What to monitor: Explicitly clarify the applicability of cost terms in settlement negotiations to effectively manage cross-border IP dispute risks.

items.title: UPC: Revocation of Independent Claims Does Not Invalidate Unchallenged Claims | Emporia v Seoul Viosys | EIP
items.title_zh: UPC：撤销独立权利要求不自动导致未受挑战的从属权利要求无效
items.title_en: UPC: Revocation of Independent Claim Does Not Automatically Invalidate Unchallenged Dependent Claims
items.summary: The UPC Central Division clarifies that revoking an independent patent claim does not automatically invalidate unchallenged dependent claims, highlighting important strategic considerations in revocation actions.
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC 中央分部在 Emporia 诉 Seoul Viosys 案中裁定，撤销专利的独立权利要求并不自动使未受挑战的从属权利要求无效。法院指出，从属权利要求的附加技术特征可能具备独立权利要求所缺乏的新颖性或创造性。即便独立权利要求因增加事项被撤销，专利权人仍可通过修改将从属权利要求提升为独立形式以维持专利部分有效。
items.ai_summary_en: The UPC Central Division clarified in Emporia v Seoul Viosys that revoking an independent patent claim does not automatically invalidate unchallenged dependent claims. The Court emphasized that dependent claims may possess additional technical features providing novelty or inventive step distinct from the revoked independent claim. Even if an independent claim is invalidated, patent proprietors can maintain partial validity by amending claims to elevate dependent claims into independent form. This decision underscores the strategic importance of defending unchallenged claims separately and actively pursuing claim amendments during revocation proceedings to preserve core technical solutions.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This ruling highlights critical procedural strategies for managing patent validity disputes at the UPC. Parties facing revocation actions should not assume total invalidity upon losing an independent claim. Instead, they must vigorously defend unchallenged dependent claims and promptly file amendment requests to restructure the patent scope. Proactive claim management ensures that valuable technical features remain protected, preventing unnecessary loss of rights and maximizing the commercial value of the remaining patent portfolio during litigation.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["独立权利要求撤销不自动波及未受挑战的从属权利要求", "从属权利要求的附加特征可单独满足新颖性与创造性要求", "专利权人需主动申请修改以将从属权利要求转为独立形式"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Revocation of an independent claim does not automatically extend to unchallenged dependent claims within the same patent.", "Dependent claims may independently satisfy novelty and inventive step requirements through their specific additional technical features.", "Patent proprietors must actively request amendments to elevate valid dependent claims into independent form to maintain patent protection."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["独立权利要求失效不等于专利整体无效，需重点防御从属权利要求", "应及时启动权利要求修改程序，将有效从属权利要求升格为独立权利要求"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Total invalidity is not automatic; defending unchallenged dependent claims is essential to preserve core technology.", "Practice note: Promptly initiate claim amendment procedures to elevate valid dependent claims into independent form during proceedings.", "What to monitor: Strategic implications for parallel proceedings and the specific treatment of unchallenged claims in future UPC decisions."]
core_points_en: Revocation of an independent claim does not automatically extend to unchallenged dependent claims within the same patent.
Dependent claims may independently satisfy novelty and inventive step requirements through their specific additional technical features.
Patent proprietors must actively request amendments to elevate valid dependent claims into independent form to maintain patent protection.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Total invalidity is not automatic; defending unchallenged dependent claims is essential to preserve core technology.
Practice note: Promptly initiate claim amendment procedures to elevate valid dependent claims into independent form during proceedings.
What to monitor: Strategic implications for parallel proceedings and the specific treatment of unchallenged claims in future UPC decisions.

items.title: Modular IP Education Framework marks three years of growing impact
items.title_zh: EPO模块化IP教育框架实施三年影响显著
items.title_en: EPO Modular IP Education Framework Reaches Three Years with Significant Impact
items.summary: An exchange on insights, best practices and shared values to advance gender parity in innovation
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局（EPO）宣布其模块化知识产权教育框架（MIPEF）实施三年来成效显著。该框架旨在将IP教育融入STEM学科，已覆盖31个EPC缔约国的100多所大学，惠及6500多名学生并颁发2500多份证书。通过提供结构化、灵活的课程，MIPEF填补了高等教育中技术学科IP教育的空白，助力培养具备专利知识的下一代创新者，促进欧洲创新文化发展。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Patent Office reports that its Modular IP Education Framework (MIPEF) has achieved significant impact over its first three years. Designed to integrate intellectual property education into STEM disciplines, the initiative now spans over 100 universities across 31 EPC contracting states. It has engaged more than 6,500 students and awarded over 2,500 certifications. By providing structured, flexible courses, MIPEF addresses a critical gap in higher education regarding technical IP training without requiring additional institutional infrastructure. This approach empowers future inventors and entrepreneurs with essential patent knowledge, fostering a more innovative and compliant culture across Europe while democratizing access to high-quality IP resources.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类官方动向给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: Corporate stakeholders should monitor the expansion of specialized IP education programs like MIPEF, as they signal shifting talent pipelines in Europe. Integrating similar modular training can enhance internal R&D teams' patent awareness and layout capabilities, ensuring better alignment with strict European innovation compliance standards. Companies may also explore partnerships with participating universities to access a pool of graduates equipped with both technical expertise and foundational IP knowledge. Leveraging such EPO resources supports robust internal IP management strategies, strengthening market competitiveness and risk mitigation for entities operating within the European jurisdiction.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["MIPEF覆盖31国百所高校，认证超2500人，深化STEM领域IP教育", "提供灵活课程填补高校技术学科IP教育空白，无需额外培训结构", "获证学生可得EPO证书及ECTS学分，赋能未来发明人与创业者"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["MIPEF covers over one hundred universities in thirty-one countries, certifying more than two thousand five hundred participants to deepen IP education within STEM fields.", "The framework offers flexible courses that fill gaps in technical IP education at universities, eliminating the need for complex additional training structures.", "Certified students receive EPO certificates and potential ECTS credits, empowering future inventors and entrepreneurs with practical intellectual property skills."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["借鉴MIPEF模式强化内部IP培训，提升研发团队专利实务能力", "关注欧洲高校IP教育动态，探索校企合作以获取优质IP人才资源"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Adopting modular IP training models enhances R&D patent literacy and aligns internal practices with European innovation compliance requirements.", "Practice note: Engage with partner universities to recruit graduates possessing combined technical and IP competencies, strengthening talent acquisition strategies.", "What to monitor: Track the evolution of EPO educational initiatives and university participation rates to anticipate shifts in available IP-skilled workforce demographics."]
core_points_en: MIPEF covers over one hundred universities in thirty-one countries, certifying more than two thousand five hundred participants to deepen IP education within STEM fields.
The framework offers flexible courses that fill gaps in technical IP education at universities, eliminating the need for complex additional training structures.
Certified students receive EPO certificates and potential ECTS credits, empowering future inventors and entrepreneurs with practical intellectual property skills.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Adopting modular IP training models enhances R&D patent literacy and aligns internal practices with European innovation compliance requirements.
Practice note: Engage with partner universities to recruit graduates possessing combined technical and IP competencies, strengthening talent acquisition strategies.
What to monitor: Track the evolution of EPO educational initiatives and university participation rates to anticipate shifts in available IP-skilled workforce demographics.

items.title: Judgment of the Court in Case C-769/22 Commission v Hungary (Values of the European Union)
items.title_zh: 欧盟法院裁定匈牙利LGBTI+相关法律违反欧盟法及GDPR
items.title_en: CJEU Rules Hungary’s LGBTI+ Content Restrictions Breach EU Law and GDPR
items.summary: Values of the European Union: by adopting a law which stigmatises and marginalises LGBTI+ persons, Hungary has acted in breach of EU law
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟法院在委员会诉匈牙利案中裁定，匈牙利2021年修订的《儿童保护法》因污名化LGBTI+群体而违反欧盟法。法院首次认定成员国侵犯《欧盟条约》第2条价值观，并指出该法违反内部市场服务自由、《欧盟基本权利宪章》及《通用数据保护条例》（GDPR）。判决要求匈牙利停止限制涉及性别认同或同性恋内容的传播，确立了欧盟价值观与数据权利在成员国立法中的优先地位。
items.ai_summary_en: In Case C-769/22 Commission v Hungary, the Court of Justice of the European Union ruled that Hungary’s 2021 amendments to child protection laws violate EU law by stigmatizing and marginalizing LGBTI+ persons. For the first time in an action against a Member State, the Court found an infringement of Article 2 TEU, which establishes the Union’s foundational values. The judgment confirms breaches of internal market service freedoms, the Charter of Fundamental Rights, and the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). The contested legislation restricts access to content portraying gender reassignment or homosexuality. This decision reinforces the primacy of EU fundamental rights and data protection standards over national legislative measures, requiring Hungary to cease restrictions on such content dissemination.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国出海企业需高度关注欧盟“价值观合规”趋势。除传统IP外，广告与内容营销若涉及性别议题，可能触发GDPR及基本权利诉讼风险。建议审查欧洲区内容策略，确保符合反歧视标准，避免因政治正确问题导致服务受限或品牌声誉受损。
items.ai_insight_en: This ruling highlights the increasing intersection between content regulation, non-discrimination principles, and data privacy within the EU. Companies operating in Europe must ensure their marketing and content strategies align with strict anti-discrimination standards to avoid regulatory scrutiny. The decision signals that national laws restricting content based on identity may face immediate legal challenges under EU primary law and the GDPR. Businesses should proactively review their European operations to mitigate risks related to brand reputation and service accessibility, ensuring compliance with evolving interpretations of fundamental rights and data protection obligations across Member States.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["欧盟法院首次认定成员国立法侵犯《欧盟条约》第2条确立的欧盟价值观", "匈牙利法律因限制LGBTI+内容被裁定违反内部市场服务自由及GDPR规定", "判决强调欧盟基本权利宪章对成员国立法具有直接约束力，需保障非歧视原则"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The CJEU established a precedent by finding a Member State breached Article 2 TEU for the first time.", "Hungary's restrictions on LGBTI+ content were ruled violations of internal market services and GDPR.", "The judgment affirms the direct binding force of the EU Charter of Fundamental Rights on national laws."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["警惕欧盟以基本权利和GDPR为由的内容监管风险，审查营销素材", "确保在欧洲市场的服务提供符合非歧视原则，避免触犯欧盟价值观底线"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Review European content and advertising strategies to ensure alignment with non-discrimination and fundamental rights standards.", "Practice note: Assess potential liabilities under GDPR and the Charter when deploying content involving gender or sexual orientation themes.", "What to monitor: Future enforcement actions regarding national laws that restrict content based on identity, impacting service provision."]
core_points_en: The CJEU established a precedent by finding a Member State breached Article 2 TEU for the first time.
Hungary's restrictions on LGBTI+ content were ruled violations of internal market services and GDPR.
The judgment affirms the direct binding force of the EU Charter of Fundamental Rights on national laws.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Review European content and advertising strategies to ensure alignment with non-discrimination and fundamental rights standards.
Practice note: Assess potential liabilities under GDPR and the Charter when deploying content involving gender or sexual orientation themes.
What to monitor: Future enforcement actions regarding national laws that restrict content based on identity, impacting service provision.

items.title: UPC Ruling Defines The Limits Of Unitary Patent Protection
items.title_zh: UPC 裁决界定单一专利保护的适用极限
items.title_en: UPC Appeal Court Confirms Strict Territorial Scope for Unitary Patent Effect
items.summary: The Unified Patent Court system offers streamlined patent protection across multiple European jurisdictions, but understanding its mechanisms and strategic implications remains crucial for rights holders.
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC 上诉院确认，欧洲专利若要在所有参与成员国获得单一效力，必须在各国拥有完全相同的权利要求集。因马耳他于申请日后才加入欧洲专利公约，导致涉案专利无法覆盖该国，故被驳回单一效力请求。法院坚持严格解释法规，拒绝因地域缺失非权利人可控而给予灵活性。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court (UPC) Court of Appeal has clarified the strict territorial requirements for unitary patent protection. The ruling confirms that a European patent benefits from unitary effect only if it covers all participating member states with an identical set of claims in each jurisdiction. In this specific case, the patent proprietor sought unitary effect for a divisional application filed in 2005. However, Malta, a current participating state, had not yet acceded to the European Patent Convention at the time of filing. Consequently, the patent did not cover Malta. The Court rejected arguments for flexibility regarding circumstances beyond the proprietor's control, upholding the European Patent Office’s refusal to grant unitary effect due to the lack of uniform territorial coverage across all participating states.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧申请专利时，需严格核查目标国在优先权日或申请日的公约成员状态。对于涉及新加入成员国的分案申请，应评估单一专利路径的可行性，避免因部分国家缺失导致整体单一效力失效，必要时考虑传统生效模式。
items.ai_insight_en: Rights holders must verify the European Patent Convention membership status of all participating states as of the priority or filing date when seeking unitary effect. For divisional applications involving countries that joined the system after the original filing, the absence of coverage in those jurisdictions will preclude unitary protection entirely. Strategic planning should assess whether to pursue traditional national validations for specific gaps or accept the loss of unitary status. This strict interpretation emphasizes the need for early due diligence on territorial coverage to avoid unexpected limitations in enforcement scope and cost-saving benefits associated with the unitary patent system.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["单一效力要求专利在所有参与国具有完全相同的权利要求集", "申请日前未加入公约的成员国（如马耳他）导致无法获得单一保护", "UPC 上诉院拒绝因客观情况排除领土而放宽单一效力的法定条件"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Unitary effect requires identical claims covering all participating member states without exception or territorial gaps.", "Patents filed before a country's accession to the EPC cannot include that state, disqualifying them from unitary protection.", "The UPC Court of Appeal rejects flexible interpretations, strictly enforcing statutory conditions despite uncontrollable historical factors."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["核查申请日各国公约状态，避免因地域缺失丧失单一效力", "针对特定国家缺口，提前规划传统验证与单一专利的组合策略"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Verify EPC membership status of all participating states at the filing date to ensure eligibility for unitary effect.", "Practice note: Evaluate alternative strategies, such as traditional national validations, for divisional cases with unavoidable territorial gaps.", "What to monitor: Future UPC jurisprudence regarding strict adherence to territorial uniformity and potential legislative adjustments."]
core_points_en: Unitary effect requires identical claims covering all participating member states without exception or territorial gaps.
Patents filed before a country's accession to the EPC cannot include that state, disqualifying them from unitary protection.
The UPC Court of Appeal rejects flexible interpretations, strictly enforcing statutory conditions despite uncontrollable historical factors.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Verify EPC membership status of all participating states at the filing date to ensure eligibility for unitary effect.
Practice note: Evaluate alternative strategies, such as traditional national validations, for divisional cases with unavoidable territorial gaps.
What to monitor: Future UPC jurisprudence regarding strict adherence to territorial uniformity and potential legislative adjustments.

items.title: There is no global patent, but a PCT international application can be useful
items.title_zh: 不存在全球专利，但 PCT 国际申请极具价值
items.title_en: No Global Patent Exists, Yet PCT International Applications Offer Strategic Value
items.summary: There is no global patent that covers the world, but a PCT international patent application can be useful. Discover the benefits of the PCT route.
items.ai_summary_zh: 文章澄清不存在覆盖全球的“世界专利”，专利权具有地域性。PCT 体系允许申请人通过单一语言、单一局提交申请，在 158 个缔约国保留权利，并延长进入国家阶段的时间至 30-31 个月。该机制虽不直接授予专利，但能优化多国布局的成本与决策流程，适合目标市场尚不明确的情况。
items.ai_summary_en: This article clarifies that no single 'world patent' exists, as patent rights are strictly territorial and require separate grants in each jurisdiction. The Patent Cooperation Treaty (PCT) system provides a streamlined solution by allowing applicants to file a single application in one language with one receiving office. This mechanism reserves rights across all 158 contracting states and extends the timeline for entering national phases to 30–31 months from the priority date. Although the international phase does not grant patents directly, it produces an international search report citing relevant prior art. This process optimizes cost management and decision-making for multi-country protection strategies, particularly when target markets remain uncertain or require further evaluation before committing to expensive national filings.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，国际后续是否会围绕这类规则指引给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: For entities expanding into European markets, leveraging the PCT mechanism’s 30-month window allows for thorough assessment of commercial potential before committing to specific national entries. This approach prevents premature expenditure on multiple national application fees and reduces financial risk. By deferring the decision to enter national phases, companies can align their intellectual property strategy with actual market traction. This is particularly relevant for optimizing overseas IP asset allocation efficiency, ensuring that resources are directed toward jurisdictions with confirmed business value rather than speculative filings.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["专利权具地域性，需分别在各国获取授权而非存在全球专利", "PCT 申请可统一入口并保留 158 国权利，延缓高额费用支出", "国际阶段仅出具检索报告，最终须进入各国阶段方可获权"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Patents are territorial rights requiring separate national or regional grants, with no single global patent available for worldwide coverage.", "The PCT system unifies the filing process, preserving rights in 158 contracting states while delaying high national phase costs.", "The international phase yields only a search report; final patent grants require entering specific national or regional phases."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用 PCT 三十个月窗口期，精准评估欧洲目标市场后再布局", "避免直接多国递交，通过 PCT 降低前期资金压力与决策风险"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Use the PCT thirty-month window to evaluate European target markets before finalizing geographic coverage.", "Practice note: Avoid direct multi-country filings initially; use the PCT route to mitigate upfront capital pressure and strategic decision risks.", "What to monitor: Track changes in PCT fee structures and national phase entry requirements to optimize timing for cost-effective portfolio management."]
core_points_en: Patents are territorial rights requiring separate national or regional grants, with no single global patent available for worldwide coverage.
The PCT system unifies the filing process, preserving rights in 158 contracting states while delaying high national phase costs.
The international phase yields only a search report; final patent grants require entering specific national or regional phases.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Use the PCT thirty-month window to evaluate European target markets before finalizing geographic coverage.
Practice note: Avoid direct multi-country filings initially; use the PCT route to mitigate upfront capital pressure and strategic decision risks.
What to monitor: Track changes in PCT fee structures and national phase entry requirements to optimize timing for cost-effective portfolio management.

items.title: L’INPI à GO Entrepreneurs Paris 2026
items.title_zh: 法国 INPI 亮相 2026 巴黎创业者大会
items.title_en: INPI Engages Entrepreneurs at GO Entrepreneurs Paris 2026 with IP and Administrative Support
items.summary: L’INPI à GO Entrepreneurs Paris 2026 sgurtler@inpi.fr 17 avril 2026 Présent tout au long du salon GO Entrepreneurs, l’INPI a une nouvelle fois affirmé son engagement aux côtés des porteurs de projets, créateurs et dirigeants d’entreprise. Sur son stand, nos équipes ont accueilli plus de 1 000 visiteurs pour échanger autour de leurs enjeux et leur apporter des réponses, que ce soit en matière de propriété intellectuelle ou de formalités d’entreprise. Accompagnement à la création, protection des i
items.ai_summary_zh: 法国国家工业产权局（INPI）全程参与 2026 年巴黎创业者大会，设立展位接待超千名访客，提供知识产权与企业手续咨询。局方专家通过圆桌会议和研讨会指导初创企业，强调从公司注册到专利商标保护的全面支持，并指出知识产权是保障经济与技术主权的关键资产。
items.ai_summary_en: The French National Institute of Industrial Property (INPI) maintained a strong presence throughout the GO Entrepreneurs Paris 2026 trade show, reaffirming its commitment to supporting project leaders, creators, and business executives. At its exhibition stand, INPI teams welcomed over 1,000 visitors to discuss their specific challenges and provide guidance on intellectual property matters and corporate administrative formalities. Experts offered advice ranging from business creation support to the protection of innovations and the valuation of intangible assets. Additionally, the Institute participated in several key salon events, including roundtables and workshops that attracted more than 250 entrepreneurs. These sessions highlighted the critical role of IP in securing economic and technological sovereignty, emphasizing comprehensive support from initial registration through to patent and trademark protection.
items.ai_insight_zh: 赴法或拟进入法国市场的中国企业应重视早期 IP 布局，利用 INPI 一站式服务降低合规成本。建议主动参与此类官方活动，获取最新政策指引，将品牌建设与技术保护纳入出海战略核心。
items.ai_insight_en: For companies operating in or entering the French market, leveraging the INPI’s single-window services can significantly streamline compliance and reduce administrative burdens during early expansion phases. Integrating robust intellectual property strategies into market entry plans is essential for safeguarding brand identity and technological assets against misappropriation. Stakeholders should actively engage with official industry events to stay informed about regulatory updates and available support mechanisms. Proactive engagement ensures that both branding efforts and technical protections are aligned with local legal frameworks, minimizing risks associated with bad-faith registrations and enhancing long-term competitive positioning within the European landscape.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["INPI 在展会接待超千名访客，提供知产与行政手续咨询", "举办多场研讨活动，覆盖企业创立至创新保护全周期", "强调无知产保护的创新如同无锁房屋，易遭侵权占用"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["INPI hosted over 1,000 visitors at its stand, providing direct consultations on intellectual property rights and essential corporate administrative procedures.", "Experts guided entrepreneurs through the full lifecycle of business development, covering creation steps, innovation protection, and asset valorization strategies.", "Officials emphasized that unprotected innovations risk unauthorized use, comparing them to houses without locks, thereby underscoring IP's role in economic sovereignty."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用 INPI 一站式窗口，高效完成注册与知产保护布局", "强化无形资产保护意识，防范技术成果被恶意抢注风险"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Utilize INPI’s centralized services to efficiently manage company registration and establish foundational IP protection layouts.", "Practice note: Strengthen awareness of intangible asset protection to mitigate risks of malicious squatting and unauthorized exploitation of innovations.", "What to monitor: Official policy shifts and support initiatives announced at major French entrepreneurial forums to align strategic IP planning."]
core_points_en: INPI hosted over 1,000 visitors at its stand, providing direct consultations on intellectual property rights and essential corporate administrative procedures.
Experts guided entrepreneurs through the full lifecycle of business development, covering creation steps, innovation protection, and asset valorization strategies.
Officials emphasized that unprotected innovations risk unauthorized use, comparing them to houses without locks, thereby underscoring IP's role in economic sovereignty.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Utilize INPI’s centralized services to efficiently manage company registration and establish foundational IP protection layouts.
Practice note: Strengthen awareness of intangible asset protection to mitigate risks of malicious squatting and unauthorized exploitation of innovations.
What to monitor: Official policy shifts and support initiatives announced at major French entrepreneurial forums to align strategic IP planning.

items.title: Deutsche Patentanmeldungen in Digitaltechnologien legen stark zu
items.title_zh: 德国数字技术专利申请量大幅增长
items.title_en: German Digital Technology Patent Filings Surge, Driven by AI and Computer Technology
items.summary: Deutsche Patentanmeldungen in Digitaltechnologien legen stark zu - Aktuelle DPMA-Analyse: Künstliche Intelligenz und digitale Vernetzung – Deutsche Unternehmen holen bei Anmeldungen für ihren Heimatmarkt in wichtigen Bereichen auf. DPMA-Präsidentin: Es geht um Wohlstand und digitale Souveränität – Konsequenter Schutz geistigen Eigentums Basis für den wirtschaftlichen Erfolg - Die Analyse zu Digitaltechnologien im Detail - Die Technologiefelder im Detail:Computertechnik - Digitale Kommunikationst
items.ai_summary_zh: 德国专利商标局（DPMA）2026 年分析显示，2025 年德国本土数字关键技术领域专利申请公开量达 5051 件，同比增长 12.3%。其中计算机技术领域增长最快，增幅达 20.5%，主要涉及人工智能发明。德国在本土市场申请量排名全球第五，但增速仅次于中国，凸显其在数字主权和经济繁荣方面的战略投入。
items.ai_summary_en: The German Patent and Trade Mark Office (DPMA) reports a significant rise in domestic patent applications within key digital technologies. In 2025, 5,051 applications with effect for the German market were published, representing a 12.3 percent year-on-year increase. Germany ranks fifth globally on its home market but records the second-highest growth rate among top five nations, trailing only China. The computer technology sector led this expansion with a 20.5 percent surge, largely attributed to artificial intelligence inventions. DPMA President Eva Schewior emphasized that robust intellectual property protection is fundamental to economic prosperity and digital sovereignty. This trend highlights Germany’s strategic commitment to maintaining competitiveness in critical digital fields through consistent IP management and innovation support.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧应关注德国数字技术专利布局加速趋势，特别是在 AI 和计算机技术领域。建议加强在德专利申请策略，评估潜在侵权风险，并利用当地知识产权制度保护自身创新成果，提升在欧洲市场的竞争力。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants should note the accelerated pace of patent activity in Germany’s digital sector, particularly within artificial intelligence and computer technology. This intensifying landscape suggests heightened competition for technological dominance. Companies operating in Europe should evaluate their current filing strategies to ensure adequate coverage in these high-growth areas. Proactive monitoring of new publications is advisable to identify potential freedom-to-operate risks early. Leveraging the German IP system effectively can help secure competitive advantages and protect innovations against emerging local and international rivals in these critical digital domains.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["德国数字技术专利申请量显著上升，计算机技术领域领跑", "人工智能相关发明是推动专利申请增长的主要驱动力", "DPMA 强调知识产权保护对维持经济竞争力至关重要"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["German digital technology patent filings rose 12.3 percent in 2025, reaching 5,051 published applications for the domestic market.", "Computer technology saw the strongest growth at 20.5 percent, primarily driven by inventions related to artificial intelligence developments.", "DPMA leadership stresses that strategic intellectual property protection is essential for sustaining economic success and digital sovereignty."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注德国 AI 领域专利动态，优化在欧布局策略", "强化知识产权防护，应对日益激烈的技术竞争"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Monitor accelerating German patent activity in AI and computer tech to assess competitive threats and opportunities.", "Practice note: Review and optimize European filing strategies to ensure robust protection in high-growth digital technology sectors.", "What to monitor: Track new DPMA publications in artificial intelligence to identify potential infringement risks and prior art."]
core_points_en: German digital technology patent filings rose 12.3 percent in 2025, reaching 5,051 published applications for the domestic market.
Computer technology saw the strongest growth at 20.5 percent, primarily driven by inventions related to artificial intelligence developments.
DPMA leadership stresses that strategic intellectual property protection is essential for sustaining economic success and digital sovereignty.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Monitor accelerating German patent activity in AI and computer tech to assess competitive threats and opportunities.
Practice note: Review and optimize European filing strategies to ensure robust protection in high-growth digital technology sectors.
What to monitor: Track new DPMA publications in artificial intelligence to identify potential infringement risks and prior art.

items.title: Candidate Support Programme expands access to EPAC certification in Europe
items.title_zh: EPO启动候选人支持计划，扩大欧洲专利行政认证准入
items.title_en: EPO Launches First Candidate Support Programme to Broaden Access to EPAC Certification
items.summary: Candidate Support Programme expands access to EPAC certification in Europe
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局（EPO）联合各国专利局启动首届“候选人支持计划”（CSP），旨在提升欧洲专利行政认证（EPAC）的可及性。该计划为入选者提供培训、辅导及考试费用资助。2026年首周期吸引16个成员国参与，收到62份申请，其中女性占比73%。EPAC采用模块化考试形式，涵盖欧洲及国际专利程序管理技能，旨在构建更具包容性的专利专业队伍，促进性别与地域平衡。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Patent Office has initiated the first cycle of the Candidate Support Programme dedicated to the European Patent Administration Certification. Implemented with national patent offices, this initiative aims to foster a more inclusive and geographically balanced patent profession. Selected candidates receive comprehensive support, including training, tutoring, exam fees, and bursaries. The inaugural cycle attracted sixty-two applications from sixteen member states, with women comprising seventy-three percent of applicants. Participants represent diverse sectors, including private practice, industry, and academia. Sixteen candidates were nominated for support. The programme is now in its preparation phase, featuring online training and modular examinations scheduled for November 2026. This development highlights growing interest in professional certification for patent administration, facilitated by improved digital accessibility and structured financial aid.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业应关注EPAC认证在提升专利流程管理专业性方面的价值。利用CSP等支持机制培养具备国际视野的专利行政人才，有助于优化对欧专利布局与维护效率，降低合规风险，并增强在欧洲创新生态系统中的专业影响力。
items.ai_insight_en: Organizations operating within the European innovation ecosystem should recognize the strategic value of the European Patent Administration Certification. Validating procedural expertise through such certifications enhances compliance and operational efficiency in managing complex patent portfolios. Leveraging support mechanisms like the Candidate Support Programme allows entities to cultivate skilled administrative talent without prohibitive costs. This approach not only optimizes maintenance workflows but also strengthens professional standing among European peers. As certification becomes more accessible, integrating these standards into internal training frameworks can mitigate procedural risks and improve overall quality control in cross-border intellectual property management.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["EPO启动首届CSP计划，为EPAC候选人提供全方位培训与资金支持", "首周期获16个成员国响应，女性申请人占比高达73%，体现多样性", "EPAC实行模块化考试，验证专利行政人员处理欧专程序的专业能力"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The EPO launched the first Candidate Support Programme cycle for EPAC, offering full training and financial support to selected professionals across Europe.", "Sixteen member states participated in the initial cycle, receiving sixty-two applications with seventy-three percent of applicants being women.", "EPAC utilizes modular examinations to validate skills in managing European and international patent procedures, promoting professional inclusivity."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注EPAC认证价值，提升对欧专利流程管理的专业性与合规性", "利用支持计划培养国际化专利行政人才，优化欧洲专利布局维护"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Recognize EPAC certification as a benchmark for procedural excellence, enhancing compliance and efficiency in European patent portfolio management.", "Practice note: Utilize support programmes like CSP to develop skilled administrative talent cost-effectively, optimizing workflow quality and reducing operational risks.", "What to monitor: Track the expansion of certified personnel and evolving examination formats to align internal training strategies with emerging professional standards."]
core_points_en: The EPO launched the first Candidate Support Programme cycle for EPAC, offering full training and financial support to selected professionals across Europe.
Sixteen member states participated in the initial cycle, receiving sixty-two applications with seventy-three percent of applicants being women.
EPAC utilizes modular examinations to validate skills in managing European and international patent procedures, promoting professional inclusivity.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Recognize EPAC certification as a benchmark for procedural excellence, enhancing compliance and efficiency in European patent portfolio management.
Practice note: Utilize support programmes like CSP to develop skilled administrative talent cost-effectively, optimizing workflow quality and reducing operational risks.
What to monitor: Track the expansion of certified personnel and evolving examination formats to align internal training strategies with emerging professional standards.

items.title: The UPC aligns with the EPO on added matter (UPC_CFI_808/2025)
items.title_zh: UPC 巴黎分院在新增事项问题上与 EPO 立场趋同
items.title_en: UPC Paris Aligns with EPO on Added Matter in Guardant Health v. Sophia Genetics
items.summary: Court docket: LD Paris
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC 巴黎地方法院在 Guardant Health 诉 Sophia Genetics 案中裁定，分案申请若将原申请作为“碎片库”组合特征，构成新增事项。法院强调发明必须能直接明确推导，且原告仅凭新闻稿不足以证明侵权。此判决显示 UPC 在新增事项审查上采纳了类似 EPO 的严格标准。
items.ai_summary_en: In Guardant Health v. Sophia Genetics, the UPC Local Division in Paris ruled that combining features from disparate parts of a parent application to form a divisional patent constitutes added matter. The Court emphasized that claimed subject matter must be directly and unambiguously derivable from the original filing, rejecting the use of the application as a reservoir for scattered fragments. Additionally, the judgment clarified evidentiary standards for provisional measures, stating that relying solely on press releases is insufficient to demonstrate infringement with the required degree of certainty. This decision signals that the UPC is adopting a strict approach to added matter assessments, closely mirroring the established practice of the European Patent Office.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧布局分案时需避免拼凑原申请特征，确保权利要求可直接推导。诉讼中应准备详尽技术文档而非依赖公开信息，以应对 UPC 严格的举证和审查标准。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment clarifies that the UPC will likely apply the same rigorous 'directly and unambiguously derivable' standard for added matter as the EPO, rejecting arguments based on functional necessity or implicit disclosure. For patent proprietors, this necessitates careful drafting of divisional applications to ensure all claim elements are explicitly supported by the original text, avoiding reliance on combining isolated features. In litigation, parties seeking provisional measures must prepare comprehensive technical documentation and evidence regarding the accused product's operation, rather than depending on public statements or press releases, to satisfy the court's stringent requirements for proving infringement.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["法院认定从原申请分散片段组合特征构成新增事项", "原告仅凭新闻稿无法满足侵权举证的高度确定性要求", "UPC 在新增事项审查上与 EPO 严格立场趋于一致"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Combining scattered features from a parent application into a divisional patent constitutes added matter if not directly derivable.", "Plaintiffs cannot rely solely on press releases to meet the high burden of proof required for demonstrating infringement.", "The UPC Local Division in Paris aligns its strict added matter assessment with the established standards of the EPO."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["分案申请严禁将原说明书作为特征组合的素材库", "侵权诉讼需依托深层技术文档而非单一新闻发布"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Ensure divisional claims are explicitly supported by the original disclosure to avoid added matter objections under UPC scrutiny.", "Practice note: Gather detailed technical evidence and documentation for infringement proofs; do not rely exclusively on public press releases.", "What to monitor: Future UPC decisions to confirm if this strict alignment with EPO added matter standards becomes consistent across other divisions."]
core_points_en: Combining scattered features from a parent application into a divisional patent constitutes added matter if not directly derivable.
Plaintiffs cannot rely solely on press releases to meet the high burden of proof required for demonstrating infringement.
The UPC Local Division in Paris aligns its strict added matter assessment with the established standards of the EPO.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Ensure divisional claims are explicitly supported by the original disclosure to avoid added matter objections under UPC scrutiny.
Practice note: Gather detailed technical evidence and documentation for infringement proofs; do not rely exclusively on public press releases.
What to monitor: Future UPC decisions to confirm if this strict alignment with EPO added matter standards becomes consistent across other divisions.

items.title: Quality dashboard: quarterly update
items.title_zh: 欧洲专利局更新质量仪表盘：2026年一季度数据
items.title_en: EPO Quality Dashboard Update: Q1 2026 Audit Data on Search and Examination Standards
items.summary: An exchange on insights, best practices and shared values to advance gender parity in innovation
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局（EPO）更新其质量仪表盘，公布2026年第一季度审计数据。检索方面，93.5%的审计检索未发现新颖性或创造性问题；审查方面，89.5%的授权专利无影响有效性的缺陷，其中新增主题问题比例降至3.9%。该仪表盘自2024年3月启动，旨在通过定期发布关键绩效指标（KPI），提升专利授予过程的透明度，并支持年度质量行动计划。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Patent Office (EPO) has updated its Quality dashboard with audit figures from the first quarter of 2026. The latest data, based on a 24-month rolling average, confirms high search quality, with 93.5% of audited searches showing no findings regarding novelty, inventive step, or added subject-matter. In examination, the positive trend continues, as 89.5% of audited grants had no findings potentially affecting their validity. Notably, issues related to added subject-matter decreased from 4.6% to 3.9%, reflecting the impact of implemented quality measures across operational teams. Launched in March 2024, the dashboard enhances transparency by regularly publishing key performance indicators (KPIs). This initiative supports the annual Quality Action Plan, providing stakeholders with a comprehensive overview of quality standards within the EPO’s patent granting process.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类数据发布给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: The EPO’s continued focus on strict quality control and transparency suggests applicants should prioritize rigorous pre-filing strategies. High audit pass rates indicate that robust prior art searches and precise claim drafting are essential to avoid validity challenges. Specifically, practitioners must carefully manage amendments to prevent 'added subject-matter' objections, which remain a key area of scrutiny. Companies should leverage these public KPIs to benchmark and refine their internal quality assurance processes. Aligning response strategies with EPO standards can help reduce refusal rates and accelerate grant timelines, ensuring more predictable outcomes in European patent proceedings.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["年Q1检索审计显示93.5%无新颖性或创造性缺陷", "审查授权质量持续向好，新增主题问题比例降至3.9%", "质量仪表盘定期发布KPI以增强专利授予流程透明度"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Q1 2026 search audits show 93.5% of cases had no novelty or inventive step defects.", "Examination quality improves, with added subject-matter issues dropping to 3.9%.", "The dashboard publishes regular KPIs to enhance transparency in the patent granting process."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["强化前端检索与撰写质量，规避新增主题风险", "参考EPO KPI优化内部质检，提升授权效率"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Strengthen front-end search and claim drafting to mitigate added subject-matter risks.", "Practice note: Use EPO KPIs to optimize internal quality checks and improve grant efficiency.", "What to monitor: Ongoing trends in added subject-matter findings and overall examination quality metrics."]
core_points_en: Q1 2026 search audits show 93.5% of cases had no novelty or inventive step defects.
Examination quality improves, with added subject-matter issues dropping to 3.9%.
The dashboard publishes regular KPIs to enhance transparency in the patent granting process.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Strengthen front-end search and claim drafting to mitigate added subject-matter risks.
Practice note: Use EPO KPIs to optimize internal quality checks and improve grant efficiency.
What to monitor: Ongoing trends in added subject-matter findings and overall examination quality metrics.
