items.title: EUIPO Report on IP-Backed Finance Makes Policy Recommendations to Unlock Up To €580 Billion in Innovation Financing
items.title_zh: EUIPO 报告建议释放高达 5800 亿欧元创新融资
items.title_en: EUIPO Report Proposes Policies to Unlock €580 Billion in IP-Backed Innovation Financing
items.summary: Today, the European Union Intellectual Property Office (EUIPO) published a study exploring challenges faced by EU small- and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) in obtaining financing by offering intellectual property (IP) as collateral. Set against the backdrop of the EU’s recently launched Savings and Investment Union (SIU) program, the EUIPO’s study identifies several structural barriers preventing SMEs from obtaining IP-backed financing and concludes with a series of policy recommendations desig
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟知识产权局（EUIPO）发布研究报告，探讨欧盟中小企业以知识产权为抵押获取融资时面临的挑战。该研究结合欧盟储蓄与投资联盟计划，识别了阻碍知识产权融资的结构性障碍，并提出一系列政策建议，旨在缩小中小企业信贷缺口，释放高达 5800 亿欧元的经济价值。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Union Intellectual Property Office (EUIPO) has released a comprehensive study examining the significant challenges EU small and medium-sized enterprises face when attempting to secure financing using intellectual property as collateral. Contextualized within the framework of the EU’s newly launched Savings and Investment Union program, the report identifies critical structural barriers that currently hinder the effective utilization of IP assets for credit purposes. It concludes with a series of targeted policy recommendations aimed at bridging the persistent SME credit gap. These measures are designed to facilitate greater access to capital, potentially unlocking up to €580 billion in economic value for the broader European market by enhancing the viability of IP-backed financial instruments.
items.ai_insight_zh: 在欧中国企业应关注欧盟 IP 融资新政，评估将商标专利转化为抵押品的可行性。建议提前规范 IP 资产管理，利用潜在政策红利拓宽融资渠道，降低资金成本。
items.ai_insight_en: Stakeholders operating within the European market should closely monitor evolving regulatory frameworks regarding intellectual property valuation and collateralization. As the EUIPO advances policies to integrate IP into mainstream finance, companies must assess the feasibility of converting patents and trademarks into tangible security interests. Proactive management of IP portfolios is essential to maximize eligibility for these emerging financing channels. By standardizing asset documentation and valuation practices now, businesses can better position themselves to leverage potential policy incentives. This strategic preparation helps reduce reliance on traditional equity funding, lowers overall capital costs, and enhances financial resilience through diversified access to debt markets backed by intangible assets.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["EUIPO 发布报告分析中小企业 IP 融资难的结构障碍", "研究旨在配合欧盟储蓄与投资联盟计划解决信贷缺口", "提出政策建议以释放高达 5800 亿欧元的创新资金"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["EUIPO report analyzes structural barriers preventing EU SMEs from successfully leveraging intellectual property rights as collateral for obtaining necessary business financing.", "Study aligns with the EU Savings and Investment Union initiative to address systemic credit gaps facing innovative small and medium-sized enterprises across member states.", "Policy recommendations aim to unlock approximately €580 billion in innovation financing by improving mechanisms for valuing and securing intellectual property assets."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注欧盟 IP 融资政策动向，评估资产抵押可行性", "规范知识产权管理，利用新政红利拓宽融资渠道"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Evaluate the feasibility of using registered trademarks and patents as collateral under new EU financing frameworks to diversify funding sources.", "Practice note: Standardize intellectual property asset management and valuation processes to ensure readiness for potential IP-backed lending opportunities.", "What to monitor: Track legislative developments stemming from the EUIPO report and the Savings and Investment Union program affecting IP collateral standards."]
core_points_en: EUIPO report analyzes structural barriers preventing EU SMEs from successfully leveraging intellectual property rights as collateral for obtaining necessary business financing.
Study aligns with the EU Savings and Investment Union initiative to address systemic credit gaps facing innovative small and medium-sized enterprises across member states.
Policy recommendations aim to unlock approximately €580 billion in innovation financing by improving mechanisms for valuing and securing intellectual property assets.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Evaluate the feasibility of using registered trademarks and patents as collateral under new EU financing frameworks to diversify funding sources.
Practice note: Standardize intellectual property asset management and valuation processes to ensure readiness for potential IP-backed lending opportunities.
What to monitor: Track legislative developments stemming from the EUIPO report and the Savings and Investment Union program affecting IP collateral standards.

items.title: On the way to a global FRAND rate: Nokia drops claims against Warner and Paramount
items.title_zh: 迈向全球FRAND费率：诺基亚撤回对华纳和派拉蒙起诉
items.title_en: Nokia Withdraws UPC and Munich Actions After UK Global FRAND Rate Agreement
items.summary: After agreeing to UK FRAND rate setting, Nokia has withdrawn its pending actions against Warner Bros. and Paramount at the UPC and in Munich.
items.ai_summary_zh: 在同意英国设定全球RAND费率后，诺基亚撤回了在统一专利法院（UPC）及慕尼黑地方法院针对华纳兄弟和派拉蒙 pending 的诉讼。UPC登记显示，涉及EP 4 250 732专利的案件已撤诉；慕尼黑法院确认涉及EP 4 099 700和EP 2 130 150的案件亦被撤回。此举表明通过单一法域确定全球许可费率正成为解决跨国SEP纠纷的高效路径，显著改变了传统的平行诉讼格局。
items.ai_summary_en: Following an agreement to establish a global RAND rate in the United Kingdom, Nokia has withdrawn its pending infringement actions against Warner Bros. and Paramount at the Unified Patent Court (UPC) and the Munich Regional Court. According to the UPC register, proceedings concerning patent EP 4 250 732 were discontinued before Easter. The Munich court confirmed that claims regarding patents EP 4 099 700 and EP 2 130 150 were also withdrawn. These developments highlight the growing influence of UK courts in determining global licensing rates for standard-essential patents. This trend is reshaping traditional parallel litigation strategies, encouraging parties to resolve cross-border disputes through single-jurisdiction rate-setting rather than pursuing fragmented enforcement actions across multiple European venues.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: The withdrawal of parallel proceedings following a UK global rate decision underscores the strategic value of English jurisdiction in SEP disputes. Rights holders increasingly view single-jurisdiction determinations as efficient mechanisms to secure comprehensive licensing terms, reducing the need for costly multi-forum litigation. For implementers, this shift suggests that engaging in UK rate-setting proceedings can serve as a powerful lever to achieve global settlements and mitigate injunction risks in Europe. Legal teams should assess whether participating in UK determinations offers a more predictable and cost-effective path to resolving multinational SEP conflicts compared to defending against separate actions in the UPC or national courts.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["诺基亚因达成英国全球RAND费率协议，撤回UPC及德国针对华纳、派拉蒙的诉讼", "撤诉涉及视频编码运动预测及媒体文件排列等三项欧洲专利，案件编号已公开", "英国法院的全球费率裁定效力显现，促使权利人放弃在其他法域的平行维权行动"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Nokia withdrew UPC and Munich lawsuits against Warner and Paramount after agreeing to a UK global RAND rate setting.", "Discontinued cases involve three European patents covering video coding motion prediction and media file arrangement techniques.", "The UK court's global rate determination effectively prompted the patentee to abandon parallel enforcement actions in other jurisdictions."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用英国全球费率裁定作为杠杆，推动跨国SEP纠纷的一揽子解决", "关注平行诉讼策略变化，评估在英国应诉以规避UPC禁令风险的可行性"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Leverage UK global rate determinations to negotiate comprehensive cross-border settlements and reduce overall litigation exposure.", "Practice note: Evaluate the feasibility of contesting rates in the UK to potentially compel rights holders to withdraw parallel UPC or national court actions.", "What to monitor: Track how UK judgments influence settlement dynamics and the frequency of parallel litigation withdrawals in other European jurisdictions."]
core_points_en: Nokia withdrew UPC and Munich lawsuits against Warner and Paramount after agreeing to a UK global RAND rate setting.
Discontinued cases involve three European patents covering video coding motion prediction and media file arrangement techniques.
The UK court's global rate determination effectively prompted the patentee to abandon parallel enforcement actions in other jurisdictions.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Leverage UK global rate determinations to negotiate comprehensive cross-border settlements and reduce overall litigation exposure.
Practice note: Evaluate the feasibility of contesting rates in the UK to potentially compel rights holders to withdraw parallel UPC or national court actions.
What to monitor: Track how UK judgments influence settlement dynamics and the frequency of parallel litigation withdrawals in other European jurisdictions.

items.title: [Blog] Palmarès 2025 Des Déposants De Brevets À L’INPI
items.title_zh: 法国 INPI 发布 2025 年专利申请排行榜
items.title_en: INPI Releases 2025 Patent Filing Rankings: Stellantis and Safran Lead National Applications
items.summary: L’Institut national de la propriété industrielle (INPI) a publié son palmarès 2025 des déposants de brevets, fondé sur les demandes déposées par la voie nationale entre le 1er janvier et le 31 décembre 2025.
items.ai_summary_zh: 法国国家工业产权局（INPI）发布 2025 年国家途径专利申请排行榜。数据显示申请量同比增长 9%，Stellantis 与 Safran 连续三年位居前二，雷诺集团位列第三。汽车、航空及交通领域主导榜单，九家公共研究机构入选，外国申请人占比超一成，凸显法国作为专利保护地的吸引力。
items.ai_summary_en: The French National Institute of Industrial Property (INPI) has published its 2025 ranking of patent applicants based on national filings submitted between January 1 and December 31, 2025. The data reveals a 9% year-on-year increase in applications, underscoring the dominant role of major industrial groups in France’s inventive activity. Stellantis and Safran retained the top two positions for the third consecutive year, followed by Renault Group. The automotive, aerospace, and transport sectors account for nearly one-third of the ranked entities. Foreign applicants represent over 10% of filers, while nine public research institutions, including CEA and CNRS, feature prominently. This distribution highlights the continued attractiveness of France as a jurisdiction for patent protection and reflects a diverse, robust innovation ecosystem.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，法国后续是否会围绕这类数据发布给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: For companies operating in Europe, the INPI rankings provide critical benchmarks for competitive intelligence within key sectors like automotive and aerospace. Monitoring these trends helps identify leading innovators and potential collaboration partners among public research bodies. Strategically, leveraging the French national filing route can offer cost-effective protection compared to broader European pathways. Companies should assess whether aligning with local research ecosystems enhances their defensive posture and portfolio quality. Understanding the dominance of specific industries aids in anticipating market shifts and strengthening intellectual property strategies against emerging competitors in the French market.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["年法国国家专利申请量同比增长 9%，大型工业集团主导创新活动", "Stellantis 和 Safran 稳居前两名，汽车与航空业占据近三分之一席位", "外国企业占比超 10%，九家科研机构上榜，显示多元创新生态活力"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["National patent filings rose by 9% in 2025, with large industrial groups driving the majority of inventive activity across France.", "Stellantis and Safran maintained their top two rankings, while the automotive and aerospace sectors collectively occupy nearly one-third of the list.", "Foreign applicants exceed 10% of total filers, and nine public research institutions are included, demonstrating a vibrant and diverse innovation landscape."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["聚焦汽车与新能源领域，对标头部企业优化在法专利布局策略", "善用国家途径降低成本，深化与当地科研机构合作以增强竞争力"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Benchmark competitive positioning against top filers in automotive and renewable energy sectors to refine strategic IP planning.", "Practice note: Evaluate the French national filing route for cost efficiency and consider partnerships with local research institutions to strengthen portfolios.", "What to monitor: Track foreign applicant trends and public research contributions to gauge market attractiveness and innovation dynamics in France."]
core_points_en: National patent filings rose by 9% in 2025, with large industrial groups driving the majority of inventive activity across France.
Stellantis and Safran maintained their top two rankings, while the automotive and aerospace sectors collectively occupy nearly one-third of the list.
Foreign applicants exceed 10% of total filers, and nine public research institutions are included, demonstrating a vibrant and diverse innovation landscape.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Benchmark competitive positioning against top filers in automotive and renewable energy sectors to refine strategic IP planning.
Practice note: Evaluate the French national filing route for cost efficiency and consider partnerships with local research institutions to strengthen portfolios.
What to monitor: Track foreign applicant trends and public research contributions to gauge market attractiveness and innovation dynamics in France.

items.title: Determining Personalized Content To Be Inserted Into A Phishing Document Template: Non-technical
items.title_zh: 确定植入钓鱼文档模板的个性化内容：非技术性
items.title_en: EPO Board Rules Automated Phishing Document Generation Non-Technical Business Method
items.summary: The application underlying the discussed decision concerns a method for the automated creation of personalized phishing documents, intended for corporate security awareness training, that uses two separate databases...
items.ai_summary_zh: EPO 技术上诉委员会在 T 1908/23 号案件中裁定，一种用于企业安全意识培训的自动化钓鱼文档生成方法缺乏技术性。该方案利用分层数据库和相关性值匹配来选择针对特定目标的认知内容。委员会认为，其核心在于选择具有心理欺骗效果的内容，属于 COMVIK 方法下的“商业方法”，单纯的数据库结构未贡献足够的创造性步骤。
items.ai_summary_en: In decision T 1908/23, the EPO Technical Board of Appeal determined that a method for automatically generating personalized phishing documents for corporate security training lacks technical character. The invention utilized two separate databases and a hierarchical matching process to select tailored content based on relevance values. The Board classified these features as a non-technical business method under the COMVIK approach, as the core purpose was selecting cognitive content designed to psychologically deceive recipients. Consequently, the mere use of database structures and parameter comparisons did not establish a sufficient technical contribution for inventive step, leading to the refusal of patent protection for this specific implementation.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧申请涉及 AI 内容生成或网络安全培训专利时，需警惕“商业方法”排除风险。若发明核心仅是基于规则的内容匹配或心理策略，即便使用数据库，也难获授权。建议将权利要求聚焦于具体数据处理架构或底层技术改进，以体现真实技术贡献。
items.ai_insight_en: Applicants in cybersecurity and AI-driven content generation must carefully distinguish between technical data processing and non-technical business logic. Claims focusing solely on rule-based content matching or psychological strategies risk rejection as excluded subject matter, even when implemented via databases. To secure patentability, drafters should emphasize specific technical architectures, such as novel data handling protocols or underlying system improvements, rather than the semantic selection of information. This ensures the application demonstrates a genuine technical contribution beyond mere administrative or cognitive organization.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["分层数据库与相关性匹配被视为选择认知内容的非技术手段", "旨在心理欺骗人类接收者的内容选择构成商业方法而非技术方案", "未定义的技术参数比较不足以确立满足创造性步骤的技术贡献"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Hierarchical database structures and relevance-based matching are viewed as non-technical means for selecting cognitive content.", "Content selection aimed at psychologically deceiving human recipients constitutes a business method rather than a technical solution.", "Undefined technical parameter comparisons fail to establish the necessary technical contribution for inventive step."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["避免将纯内容匹配逻辑包装为技术方案，需突出底层技术改进", "涉 AI 生成类专利申请应着重描述数据处理的特定技术架构"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Cybersecurity firms must avoid framing pure content matching logic as technical solutions to prevent exclusion.", "Practice note: Patent applications for AI generation should highlight specific technical data processing architectures over semantic rules.", "What to monitor: EPO trends in distinguishing technical contributions from non-technical business methods in automated content creation."]
core_points_en: Hierarchical database structures and relevance-based matching are viewed as non-technical means for selecting cognitive content.
Content selection aimed at psychologically deceiving human recipients constitutes a business method rather than a technical solution.
Undefined technical parameter comparisons fail to establish the necessary technical contribution for inventive step.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Cybersecurity firms must avoid framing pure content matching logic as technical solutions to prevent exclusion.
Practice note: Patent applications for AI generation should highlight specific technical data processing architectures over semantic rules.
What to monitor: EPO trends in distinguishing technical contributions from non-technical business methods in automated content creation.

items.title: Brevet et modèle : deux atouts complémentaires pour protéger votre innovation
items.title_zh: 专利与设计：保护创新的两项互补资产
items.title_en: Patents and Designs: Complementary Assets for Protecting Innovation in France
items.summary: Brevet et modèle : deux atouts complémentaires pour protéger votre innovation llegrand@inpi.fr 09 avril 2026 Imaginez qu'un concurrent commercialise une télécommande qui ressemble trait pour trait à la vôtre : même mécanisme interne, même design extérieur. C'est précisément ce qu'a vécu la société Somfy. En 2006, le Tribunal de grande instance de Paris a sanctionné un concurrent qui copiait à la fois les mécanismes internes et l'apparence extérieure des télécommandes Somfy. Le tribunal a condamn
items.ai_summary_zh: 法国工业产权局（INPI）发文指出，专利与设计是保护产品的互补工具。文章引用 Somfy 遥控器及 Bivouac 刀具案，展示法院如何分别认定技术功能与外观设计的侵权并判处独立赔偿。核心结论强调，单一专利无法覆盖产品全貌，组合布局可构建更稳固的法律防线，即使专利无效，设计权仍可独立存续提供保护。
items.ai_summary_en: The French National Institute of Industrial Property (INPI) highlights that patents and registered designs serve as complementary tools for product protection. The article cites the Somfy remote control and Bivouac knife cases to demonstrate how courts separately adjudicate infringement of technical functions and aesthetic appearances, awarding distinct damages for each. The core conclusion emphasizes that a single patent cannot cover all aspects of a product. A combined IP strategy builds a more robust legal defense, ensuring that design rights remain valid and enforceable even if a corresponding patent is invalidated. This approach maximizes compensation potential by addressing both functional and visual copying independently.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧出口高附加值产品时，切勿仅依赖专利申请。应同步评估产品外观价值，主动注册欧盟或成员国外观设计，构建“技术 + 外观”双重壁垒，以应对竞争对手的模仿诉讼及潜在的专利无效挑战，最大化维权收益。
items.ai_insight_en: For companies operating in Europe, relying solely on patent protection leaves significant vulnerabilities regarding product appearance. Practitioners should evaluate the commercial value of industrial designs alongside technical inventions. Registering both patents and designs creates a dual barrier against imitation. This strategy is particularly relevant for high-value exports where competitors may attempt to copy external features even if internal mechanics are protected. In litigation, this dual registration allows claimants to seek independent damages for both technical and aesthetic infringements, thereby maximizing recovery and strengthening the overall enforcement position against infringers.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["专利保护技术方案，设计保护外观美学，两者客体不同互不替代", "司法实践中，针对同一产品的技术与外观抄袭可分别定罪并累计赔偿", "构建专利与设计组合布局，能有效规避单一权利被无效后的保护真空风险"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Patents protect technical solutions while designs protect aesthetic appearance; these distinct objects are not interchangeable.", "Judicial practice allows separate convictions and cumulative damages for simultaneous technical and aesthetic copying of a product.", "Combining patents and designs mitigates the risk of protection gaps if one right is invalidated, ensuring continuous coverage."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["推行“专利 + 设计”双轨布局，避免因单一权利瑕疵导致全面失守", "利用法国判例经验，在维权诉讼中主张技术与外观的双重独立赔偿"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Implement a dual patent and design layout to prevent total loss of protection due to defects in a single right.", "Practice note: Leverage French case law precedents to claim separate, cumulative damages for technical and aesthetic infringement.", "What to monitor: Monitor judicial trends in cumulative damages awards for overlapping patent and design infringement claims."]
core_points_en: Patents protect technical solutions while designs protect aesthetic appearance; these distinct objects are not interchangeable.
Judicial practice allows separate convictions and cumulative damages for simultaneous technical and aesthetic copying of a product.
Combining patents and designs mitigates the risk of protection gaps if one right is invalidated, ensuring continuous coverage.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Implement a dual patent and design layout to prevent total loss of protection due to defects in a single right.
Practice note: Leverage French case law precedents to claim separate, cumulative damages for technical and aesthetic infringement.
What to monitor: Monitor judicial trends in cumulative damages awards for overlapping patent and design infringement claims.

items.title: Court Of Appeal, March 30, 2026, Order, UPC_CoA_302/2025, CoA_305/2025
items.title_zh: 统一专利法院上诉庭裁定费用确定须由一审法院启动
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal Rules Cost Determination Must Be Initiated at First Instance
items.summary: Cost determination proceedings must always be initiated at the Court of First Instance, regardless of whether costs arise from first instance or appeal (R. 150 et seq. RoP)
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）上诉庭在涉及 Rematec 与 Europe Forestry 的案件中作出命令，明确依据《程序规则》第 150 条及以下条款，费用确定程序必须向一审法院提起。即便费用产生于上诉阶段，上诉庭也无权直接受理或转交该申请，因规则未设特别程序且此举将剥夺当事人的上诉权。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court (UPC) Court of Appeal issued an order in the dispute between Rematec GmbH & Co KG and Europe Forestry B.V., clarifying that cost determination proceedings must always be initiated before the Court of First Instance. This requirement applies under Rules 150 et seq. of the Rules of Procedure, regardless of whether the costs were incurred during first instance or appellate proceedings. The Court of Appeal confirmed it lacks jurisdiction to directly accept such applications or refer them to the lower court, as the Rules do not provide a special procedure for post-appeal cost decisions. Initiating these proceedings at the appellate level would undermine the right to appeal under Rules 157 and 221. Consequently, parties must file separate cost determination actions with the Court of First Instance to ensure procedural validity and preserve their rights.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在 UPC 诉讼中需严格遵循程序管辖，胜诉后务必向一审法院而非上诉庭申请费用裁定，避免因程序错误导致权利落空，建议提前布局一审阶段的费用证据保全。
items.ai_insight_en: Practitioners must strictly adhere to jurisdictional requirements when seeking cost awards in UPC litigation. Successful parties should initiate cost determination proceedings at the Court of First Instance rather than the Court of Appeal, irrespective of the procedural stage where costs were incurred. Filing errors may result in the dismissal of cost claims or significant delays. It is advisable to prepare comprehensive evidence regarding legal fees and expenses during the initial trial phase. This ensures readiness for the subsequent independent cost determination procedure, safeguarding the ability to recover costs effectively without procedural setbacks.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["费用确定程序属独立诉讼，必须向统一专利法院一审法院提起", "无论费用源于一审还是上诉，上诉庭均无权直接受理费用裁定申请", "程序规则未授权上诉庭将费用申请转交一审，仅限法定情形可转交"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Cost determination is a separate proceeding that must be filed exclusively with the UPC Court of First Instance.", "The Court of Appeal cannot accept cost applications or refer them, even if costs arose from appellate proceedings.", "Referrals are only permitted where expressly provided by the UPCA or Rules of Procedure, which do not cover this scenario."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["费用申请须精准投递至一审法院，切勿误向上诉庭提交", "需在一审阶段即完善费用证据链，以備后续独立程序使用"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Ensure cost determination applications are filed with the Court of First Instance to avoid procedural dismissal.", "Practice note: Compile and preserve detailed fee records during first instance proceedings for use in later cost determinations.", "What to monitor: Monitor future Rule of Procedure amendments that might introduce specific mechanisms for appellate cost decisions."]
core_points_en: Cost determination is a separate proceeding that must be filed exclusively with the UPC Court of First Instance.
The Court of Appeal cannot accept cost applications or refer them, even if costs arose from appellate proceedings.
Referrals are only permitted where expressly provided by the UPCA or Rules of Procedure, which do not cover this scenario.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Ensure cost determination applications are filed with the Court of First Instance to avoid procedural dismissal.
Practice note: Compile and preserve detailed fee records during first instance proceedings for use in later cost determinations.
What to monitor: Monitor future Rule of Procedure amendments that might introduce specific mechanisms for appellate cost decisions.

items.title: Court Of Appeal, March 27, 2026, Decision, UPC_CoA_409/2025, UPC_CoA_410/2025, UPC_CoA_420/2025
items.title_zh: 统一专利法院裁定登录系统不构成应诉管辖
items.title_en: UPC Appeal Court Rules System Login Does Not Constitute Appearance Under Brussels Ia
items.summary: Logging into the UPC's Case Management System does not constitute an "entering of an appearance" to establish jurisdiction under the Brussels Ia Regulation.
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院上诉庭在涉及 NUC Electronics 与 Hurom 的案件中裁定，被告仅登录案件管理系统查看文件，不构成《布鲁塞尔条例 Ia》意义上的“出庭应诉”。法院指出，确立管辖权需被告采取实质性步骤，如提交初步异议或答辩状，单纯访问不足以视为对法院管辖权的自愿接受或争议确认。
items.ai_summary_en: In a decision dated March 27, 2026, the Unified Patent Court Court of Appeal clarified that merely logging into the Case Management System to view case files does not amount to an 'entering of an appearance' under Article 26(1) of the Brussels Ia Regulation. The Court held that passive access to documents, prior to any active procedural step or defense, is insufficient to demonstrate a deliberate choice regarding the UPC's jurisdiction. To establish jurisdiction through appearance, a defendant must take substantive action, such as filing a Preliminary Objection under Rule 19 of the Rules of Procedure or submitting a Statement of Defence on the merits. This ruling ensures that jurisdiction is not inadvertently established through routine administrative access, requiring instead a clear, intentional engagement with the court's authority.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在应对 UPC 诉讼时，切勿因登录查看案情而误判为已应诉。应严格把控首次提交文件的时机与内容，避免因程序性操作不当导致丧失管辖权异议权利，需由专业律师评估后采取行动。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment provides critical clarity for parties involved in UPC proceedings regarding the threshold for establishing jurisdiction via appearance. Legal teams can safely access case materials via the system for preliminary assessment without risking an inadvertent waiver of jurisdictional objections. However, caution is required when preparing the first substantive submission. Parties should ensure that any initial filing explicitly addresses jurisdictional issues if they intend to challenge the court's authority, rather than assuming that mere system interaction preserves their rights. Strategic timing and content of the first formal response remain decisive.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["仅登录 UPC 系统查看文件不视为法律意义上的出庭应诉行为", "确立管辖权需提交初步异议或实体答辩等实质性诉讼步骤", "明确区分被动查阅与主动抗辩，防止管辖权被意外确立"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Logging into the UPC Case Management System to view files does not constitute entering an appearance under the Brussels Ia Regulation.", "Establishing jurisdiction requires substantive steps, such as filing a Preliminary Objection or a Statement of Defence on the merits.", "The decision distinguishes between passive file access and active litigation conduct to prevent accidental acceptance of jurisdiction."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["登录系统查阅卷宗不会触发管辖权，企业可安全进行初步评估", "首次提交异议或答辩状是确立管辖的关键节点，须谨慎决策"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Passive system access for case evaluation does not trigger jurisdictional acceptance, allowing safe preliminary review.", "Practice note: Ensure the first substantive filing clearly articulates jurisdictional challenges to preserve objection rights.", "What to monitor: Future interpretations of what constitutes an 'active step' beyond standard filings under Rule 19 and Rule 23."]
core_points_en: Logging into the UPC Case Management System to view files does not constitute entering an appearance under the Brussels Ia Regulation.
Establishing jurisdiction requires substantive steps, such as filing a Preliminary Objection or a Statement of Defence on the merits.
The decision distinguishes between passive file access and active litigation conduct to prevent accidental acceptance of jurisdiction.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Passive system access for case evaluation does not trigger jurisdictional acceptance, allowing safe preliminary review.
Practice note: Ensure the first substantive filing clearly articulates jurisdictional challenges to preserve objection rights.
What to monitor: Future interpretations of what constitutes an 'active step' beyond standard filings under Rule 19 and Rule 23.

items.title: Accord PPH avec les États-Unis
items.title_zh: 法国与美国达成专利审查高速路（PPH）协议
items.title_en: INPI and USPTO Establish Patent Prosecution Highway for Accelerated Cross-Border Examination
items.summary: Accord PPH avec les États-Unis llegrand@inpi.fr 02 avril 2026 Les conditions pour utiliser le PPH Les déposants peuvent demander l'accélération du traitement de leur demande auprès de l'un des deux offices à partir du moment où elle aura été examiné par l'autre office, indépendamment de l'ordre chronologique des dépôts et des revendications de priorité. De manière classique, après dépôt d'une requête PPH, le traitement d'une demande de brevet déposée à l'INPI et revendiquant la priorité d'une de
items.ai_summary_zh: 法国工业产权局（INPI）宣布与美国专利商标局（USPTO）建立专利审查高速路（PPH）机制。申请人若其申请已获一方办公室认定为可授权，可请求另一方加速审查，不受申请顺序限制。该程序在法国免费，旨在缩短审查周期，美国平均九个月内发出审查意见，要求权利要求范围相同或更窄。
items.ai_summary_en: The French National Institute of Industrial Property (INPI) has officially established a Patent Prosecution Highway (PPH) agreement with the United States Patent and Trademark Office (USPTO). This mechanism allows applicants to request accelerated examination in either jurisdiction once the corresponding application has been examined by the other office, regardless of filing order or priority claims. Specifically, if the USPTO deems certain claims patentable, an INPI application claiming priority from that US filing can benefit from faster processing, provided the claims are sufficiently similar or narrower. Conversely, US applications claiming priority from French filings may also be accelerated if the French office finds them patentable. The PPH request is free of charge in France. On average, the USPTO issues a patentability opinion within nine months under this program, significantly reducing the time required to secure rights in both markets.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在法美同时布局专利时，应充分利用此免费加速通道。建议优先在美或法获取有利审查结果，随即启动 PPH 请求，以低成本快速获得双方法域专利权，提升海外维权与市场准入效率。
items.ai_insight_en: This bilateral PPH arrangement offers a strategic avenue for entities managing parallel patent portfolios in Europe and the United States. By leveraging a positive examination outcome in one jurisdiction, applicants can streamline prosecution in the other without incurring additional official fees for the acceleration request in France. This approach helps mitigate legal uncertainty during critical product launch phases and accelerates market entry. Practitioners should align claim scopes carefully between jurisdictions to ensure eligibility. Monitoring the specific procedural requirements and maintaining consistent claim language across filings will be essential to fully capitalize on this efficiency mechanism and optimize global IP protection timelines.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["法美双向加速：任一局先行审查合格后，另一局可依请求加速处理", "权利要求一致性：加速申请需基于已被认定可授权的相同或更窄权利要求", "零成本高效率：法国境内提交 PPH 请求免费，显著缩短获权等待时间"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Bidirectional acceleration enables expedited review in France or the US based on prior favorable examination results from the counterpart office.", "Eligibility requires that pending claims match or are narrower than those already deemed patentable by the examining office initiating the process.", "The procedure is cost-free in France and typically reduces waiting times, with US patentability opinions issued within approximately nine months."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用单方授权结果，低成本实现法美双地快速确权", "优化申请策略，通过 PPH 机制缩短产品上市前的法律不确定期"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Leverage favorable examination outcomes in one jurisdiction to secure faster, cost-effective patent grants in the other, enhancing global portfolio efficiency.", "Practice note: Ensure claim scope consistency between French and US applications, keeping US claims identical or narrower to meet PPH eligibility criteria.", "What to monitor: Track procedural updates from INPI and USPTO regarding PPH implementation details and potential changes to processing timelines or requirements."]
core_points_en: Bidirectional acceleration enables expedited review in France or the US based on prior favorable examination results from the counterpart office.
Eligibility requires that pending claims match or are narrower than those already deemed patentable by the examining office initiating the process.
The procedure is cost-free in France and typically reduces waiting times, with US patentability opinions issued within approximately nine months.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Leverage favorable examination outcomes in one jurisdiction to secure faster, cost-effective patent grants in the other, enhancing global portfolio efficiency.
Practice note: Ensure claim scope consistency between French and US applications, keeping US claims identical or narrower to meet PPH eligibility criteria.
What to monitor: Track procedural updates from INPI and USPTO regarding PPH implementation details and potential changes to processing timelines or requirements.

items.title: Form: Request for an uncertified copy of a patent
items.title_zh: 表格：申请专利未认证副本
items.title_en: UKIPO Guidance: Requesting Uncertified Patent Copies and Comptroller Certificates
items.summary: Use this form to request a certificate of the Comptroller or an uncertified copy from a file or the register.
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国知识产权局发布专用表格，供公众向主计长申请专利证书或从档案及注册簿中获取未经认证的专利副本。该文件明确了行政申请流程，旨在规范专利文献的复制与分发服务，确保申请人及公众能合法、便捷地获取官方专利记录，属于基础行政程序指引。
items.ai_summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has released a dedicated official form for the public to request certificates from the Comptroller or obtain uncertified copies of patent documents held in files or on the register. This administrative instrument clarifies the procedural requirements for accessing official patent records, ensuring that applicants and interested parties can legally and efficiently retrieve necessary documentation. By standardizing the application process for document reproduction and distribution services, the guidance aims to enhance transparency and accessibility within the UK patent system. It serves as a fundamental procedural reference for navigating the bureaucratic aspects of obtaining certified or uncertified evidence from the national patent registry.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，英国后续是否会围绕这类规则指引给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: For entities managing patent portfolios or enforcing rights in the UK, familiarity with this administrative mechanism is essential for securing key evidentiary materials. Efficiently utilizing the UKIPO form system allows for the rapid retrieval of patent status proofs and technical documents, which are often critical in litigation or licensing negotiations. Understanding these basic procedural steps helps reduce compliance costs and ensures that factual preparations are robust. Practitioners should integrate this knowledge into their standard due diligence workflows to streamline evidence gathering and maintain operational readiness for potential disputes involving UK patents.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["提供申请主计长证书或未认证副本的专用官方表格", "明确可从专利档案或注册簿中提取相关文件副本", "规范英国专利文献获取的行政程序与服务标准"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Provides an official form specifically designed for requesting Comptroller certificates or uncertified patent copies.", "Clarifies that relevant documents can be extracted directly from patent files or the public register upon request.", "Standardizes the administrative procedures and service standards for obtaining UK patent literature and records."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["掌握 UKIPO 表格体系可提升专利证据调取效率", "获取官方副本是应对英国专利纠纷的基础准备工作"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Mastering the UKIPO form system enhances the efficiency of retrieving patent evidence for portfolio management.", "Practice note: Obtaining official copies is a foundational preparatory step for addressing UK patent disputes effectively.", "What to monitor: Updates to UKIPO administrative forms and procedures regarding access to patent register documents."]
core_points_en: Provides an official form specifically designed for requesting Comptroller certificates or uncertified patent copies.
Clarifies that relevant documents can be extracted directly from patent files or the public register upon request.
Standardizes the administrative procedures and service standards for obtaining UK patent literature and records.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Mastering the UKIPO form system enhances the efficiency of retrieving patent evidence for portfolio management.
Practice note: Obtaining official copies is a foundational preparatory step for addressing UK patent disputes effectively.
What to monitor: Updates to UKIPO administrative forms and procedures regarding access to patent register documents.

items.title: CJEU on continuity, heritage, and deceptive trademarks – Fauré Le Page Paris 1717
items.title_zh: 欧盟法院裁定商标标注虚构年份可能构成欺骗
items.title_en: CJEU: Using Historical Dates in Trademarks Without Business Continuity May Be Deceptive
items.summary: To which extent can a sign invoke heritage, age, and prestige before it crosses into deception? In the luxury sector, a trademark’s reference to a long history can signal continuity, know-how, and quality, making the line between genuine legacy and misleading branding especially thin. On 26 March 2026, the CJEU drew that boundary by stating that the difference lay in whether a business had been acquired as a whole or whether only the trademark had changed hands (C‑412/24).
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟法院在 Fauré Le Page 案中明确，若企业仅受让商标而非整体业务，却在商标中加入暗示悠久历史的年份（如 1717），可能因误导消费者关于商品连续性、技艺及声望而构成欺骗。法院强调，欺骗须涉及商品特征，但在奢侈品领域，声誉形象属于关键特征。
items.ai_summary_en: In Case C‑412/24, the Court of Justice of the European Union clarified the boundary between legitimate heritage claims and deceptive branding. The Court ruled that incorporating a historical date, such as '1717,' into a trademark may constitute deception under Article 3(1)(g) of Directive 2008/95/EC if the applicant acquired only the trademark rights rather than the historic undertaking as a whole. In the luxury sector, consumers associate such dates with continuity, specific know-how, and quality. Consequently, implying an unbroken lineage or inherited craftsmanship without factual basis misleads the public regarding essential characteristics of the goods. The judgment emphasizes that while reputation alone is insufficient for deception findings, in luxury markets, the perceived heritage and prestige are intrinsic to the product's identity and consumer perception.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧注册含历史元素的奢侈品商标时，需确保商业实体与历史传承的真实性关联。若仅收购商标而无业务延续，应避免使用暗示悠久历史的年份或描述，以防被认定为欺骗性商标导致无效或被禁。
items.ai_insight_en: For brand owners and legal practitioners, this ruling highlights the critical distinction between acquiring intellectual property assets and acquiring a going concern. When registering trademarks containing historical elements, entities must ensure a genuine link to the original enterprise’s continuity. Mere ownership of a mark does not justify claims of centuries-old tradition. Practitioners should conduct thorough due diligence during acquisitions to verify if business operations, not just IP rights, were transferred. Failure to establish this continuity risks invalidation based on deception. Companies must avoid marketing strategies that imply inherited craftsmanship or longevity when such history has been interrupted by dissolution or asset-only transfers.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["仅受让商标未承接整体业务时，标注历史年份易致欺骗", "奢侈品商标的声望形象被视为商品本身的重要特征", "虚构年份暗示技艺传承若无事实依据则违反商标指令"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Acquiring only trademark rights without the underlying business makes using historical dates potentially deceptive.", "In luxury goods, heritage and prestige are considered essential characteristics of the products themselves.", "Implying continuity of know-how through historical dates violates trademark law if no factual basis exists."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["收购旧品牌商标时需核实是否包含整体业务资产", "避免在无实际传承时使用历史年份营销以防法律风险"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Verify whether trademark acquisitions include the historic business entity to support heritage claims legally.", "Practice note: Avoid using historical dates in marks if the original undertaking was dissolved and only IP rights were transferred.", "What to monitor: Monitor national court applications of this CJEU precedent regarding deceptive heritage claims in luxury sectors."]
core_points_en: Acquiring only trademark rights without the underlying business makes using historical dates potentially deceptive.
In luxury goods, heritage and prestige are considered essential characteristics of the products themselves.
Implying continuity of know-how through historical dates violates trademark law if no factual basis exists.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Verify whether trademark acquisitions include the historic business entity to support heritage claims legally.
Practice note: Avoid using historical dates in marks if the original undertaking was dissolved and only IP rights were transferred.
What to monitor: Monitor national court applications of this CJEU precedent regarding deceptive heritage claims in luxury sectors.

items.title: Filing in DOCX now available for all users - greater flexibility and smoother workflows
items.title_zh: EPO 向所有用户开放 DOCX 格式提交以提升灵活性
items.title_en: EPO Opens DOCX Filing to All Users for Greater Flexibility and Smoother Workflows
items.summary: The new filing format builds on the EPO’s digital transformation, offering a more consistent and future-ready way to submit patent applications and other documents.
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局（EPO）宣布在完成试点后，正式向所有用户开放使用 DOCX 格式提交欧洲专利申请及后续文件。此举旨在深化数字化转型，允许绘图嵌入文档或单独上传，减少格式转换错误与人工校对时间。该更新已纳入局长决定，支持与 MyEPO 等现代工具无缝对接，实现端到端数字化处理。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Patent Office (EPO) has officially rolled out the option to file European patent applications and subsequent documents using the DOCX format to all users, following a successful pilot phase. This initiative supports the EPO’s digital transformation strategy and Strategic Plan 2028 by enabling a fully digital, end-to-end granting process. Applicants may now embed drawings directly within DOCX files or submit them separately as PDFs, offering enhanced operational flexibility. The update aligns with recent decisions by the President of the EPO regarding electronic filing. By adopting DOCX, the EPO aims to reduce formatting errors, minimize manual checks, and improve data quality throughout search, examination, and publication stages. This move facilitates smoother workflows and greater consistency, helping parties save time and avoid issues such as broken numbering or corrupted characters associated with traditional PDF conversions.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类官方动向给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: Adopting the DOCX format offers practical advantages for patent portfolios operating before the EPO. Native DOCX filing reduces risks of character corruption, layout shifts, and broken references often encountered during PDF conversion. This stability minimizes formal objections and streamlines the handling of amendments, potentially accelerating grant timelines. Teams should evaluate internal document preparation systems to support native DOCX creation, ensuring special characters and formulae are preserved accurately. Integrating this format early allows for better compatibility with future EPO digital tools and MyEPO services. Proactive adaptation helps maintain high text and data quality, reducing administrative burdens and communication costs with representatives during prosecution.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["EPO 全面推广 DOCX 格式，支持专利申请及后续文件提交", "绘图可嵌入 DOCX 或单独以 PDF 提交，提升操作灵活性", "减少格式错误与重复转换，显著优化审查与修改流程效率"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["EPO fully promotes DOCX format for submitting patent applications and subsequent documents to enhance digital processing efficiency.", "Drawings can be embedded directly in DOCX or filed separately as PDFs, significantly improving submission flexibility for applicants.", "Reducing format errors and repeated conversions optimizes examination and amendment procedures, leading to significant time savings."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["立即调整申请文件制作流程，优先采用原生 DOCX 格式", "利用格式优势减少补正通知，加快欧洲专利授权进程"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Adopting native DOCX filing reduces formal defects and formatting errors, improving first-time acceptance rates and lowering prosecution costs.", "Practice note: Update internal drafting systems to generate stable DOCX files, avoiding manual PDF conversions that risk corrupting text or layout.", "What to monitor: Review the updated Notice from the EPO and the modified definition of DOCX to ensure compliance with new filing options and technical requirements."]
core_points_en: EPO fully promotes DOCX format for submitting patent applications and subsequent documents to enhance digital processing efficiency.
Drawings can be embedded directly in DOCX or filed separately as PDFs, significantly improving submission flexibility for applicants.
Reducing format errors and repeated conversions optimizes examination and amendment procedures, leading to significant time savings.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Adopting native DOCX filing reduces formal defects and formatting errors, improving first-time acceptance rates and lowering prosecution costs.
Practice note: Update internal drafting systems to generate stable DOCX files, avoiding manual PDF conversions that risk corrupting text or layout.
What to monitor: Review the updated Notice from the EPO and the modified definition of DOCX to ensure compliance with new filing options and technical requirements.

items.title: The Unitary Patent Guidelines April 2026 update
items.title_zh: 2026年4月统一专利指南更新生效
items.title_en: UPC Unitary Patent Guidelines Update: Key Procedural and Legal Clarity Enhancements Effective April 2026
items.summary: Updated 2026 Unitary Patent Guidelines take effect 1 April, enhancing clarity, procedures, and legal detail across the UPC system.
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）运行近三年后，统一专利（UP）指南迎来修订，新版于2026年4月1日生效。此次更新旨在提升UPC系统的清晰度、程序规范及法律细节。欧洲专利局（EPO）已发布标注修改痕迹的2026版指南，对比2025版进行了广泛调整。随着对UP系统及UPC信心的增强，新规在适当位置增加了更多程序与法律依据的细节，以优化用户体验并明确操作标准。
items.ai_summary_en: Following nearly three years of Unified Patent Court operations, the updated Unitary Patent Guidelines take effect on 1 April 2026. These amendments significantly enhance procedural clarity, legal precision, and operational detail across the UPC system. The European Patent Office has published a marked-up version comparing the 2026 guidelines against the 2025 edition, highlighting widespread adjustments in almost every section. As confidence in the unitary patent system grows, these refinements provide essential legal bases and detailed procedural instructions. This update aims to optimize user experience by establishing clearer operational standards, ensuring that current and future stakeholders can navigate the UPC framework with greater certainty and reduced ambiguity regarding compliance and litigation procedures.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则指引给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: Stakeholders should closely examine the refined procedural rules within the new guidelines to ensure strict compliance with UPC requirements. Utilizing the EPO's comparative documentation allows for rapid identification of critical changes affecting ongoing matters. It is advisable to reassess European patent portfolio strategies and litigation approaches to align with these updated standards. Proactive adaptation helps mitigate procedural risks associated with non-compliance and enhances overall enforcement efficiency. By integrating these clarified procedures into existing IP management workflows, organizations can better safeguard their rights and streamline interactions with the Unified Patent Court system.

items.ai_core_points_en: ["The revised Unitary Patent Guidelines officially enter into force on 1 April 2026, marking a significant evolution in UPC procedural frameworks.", "Comprehensive revisions focus heavily on enhancing procedural clarity and providing detailed legal bases for various court actions.", "The European Patent Office provides a marked-up comparison document to help users efficiently track specific changes from the 2025 version."]

core_points_en: The revised Unitary Patent Guidelines officially enter into force on 1 April 2026, marking a significant evolution in UPC procedural frameworks.
Comprehensive revisions focus heavily on enhancing procedural clarity and providing detailed legal bases for various court actions.
The European Patent Office provides a marked-up comparison document to help users efficiently track specific changes from the 2025 version.

Practice note: Optimize European patent portfolio management processes to avoid enforcement risks stemming from procedural oversights under the updated guidelines.
What to monitor: Track further administrative interpretations or practical applications of the new guidelines as they are implemented by UPC registries.

items.title: Rapport annuel 2025
items.title_zh: 法国国家工业产权局 2025 年度报告
items.title_en: INPI 2025 Annual Report: Strategic Roadmap Launch and Key Intellectual Property Data
items.summary: Rapport annuel 2025 sgurtler@inpi.fr 31 mars 2026 L’année 2025 a été marquée par le lancement d’une nouvelle feuille de route stratégique pour l’INPI. Élément structurant pour l’Institut, le COP 2025-2029 fixe des ambitions fortes et s'inscrit dans la volonté d’apporter toujours plus de services répondant aux besoins des entrepreneurs et des innovateurs, pour contribuer à la croissance de la France. Découvrez dans ce rapport le bilan des premières actions engagées par l’Institut, tant en matière
items.ai_summary_zh: 法国国家工业产权局（INPI）发布 2025 年度报告，标志着其 2025-2029 年战略规划合同（COP）的启动。报告总结了机构在企业手续与知识产权保护方面的首批行动成果，披露了单一窗口及专利、商标等申请的关键数据。报告强调通过支持创新者需求、提升无形资产价值来推动法国经济增长，展现了机构的韧性与服务能力。
items.ai_summary_en: The French National Institute of Industrial Property (INPI) has released its 2025 Annual Report, marking the commencement of its new strategic roadmap for 2025-2029. This management contract establishes ambitious goals aimed at enhancing services for entrepreneurs and innovators to support France's economic growth. The report details the initial outcomes of institutional actions regarding business formalities and intellectual property protection. It provides key statistics on filings through the single window mechanism, including patents, trademarks, and designs. Furthermore, it highlights international initiatives and the institute's commitment to supporting innovation stages. The document underscores INPI's resilience and performance, emphasizing the valuation of intangible assets and improved service delivery to meet evolving market needs effectively.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业应关注法国 IP 政策新动向，利用其强化的服务体系优化在法布局。建议参考报告数据评估市场热度，积极利用单一窗口机制提升确权效率，并重视无形资产运营以契合当地创新支持导向。
items.ai_insight_en: Stakeholders operating within the French jurisdiction should closely examine the updated strategic priorities outlined in the INPI report. The reinforced service framework offers opportunities to optimize local intellectual property strategies through enhanced procedural efficiency. Companies are advised to utilize the single window mechanism to streamline registration processes and improve asset management capabilities. Monitoring these developments allows for better alignment with national innovation support policies. Understanding the reported trends in filing volumes and processing times can inform resource allocation and competitive positioning within the European market context.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["启动 2025-2029 战略规划合同，确立服务创新者新目标", "披露年度专利申请、商标注册及企业手续办理关键数据", "强调通过无形资产估值与支持创新助力法国经济增长"]

Disclosure of annual key data covering patent applications, trademark registrations, and essential business administrative procedures.

items.title: Post-transaction Reselection Of A Payment Method: Non-technical
items.title_zh: 交易后重选支付方式被认定为非技术性特征
items.title_en: EPO Rules Post-Transaction Payment Method Reselection Non-Technical
items.summary: The application underlying the discussed decision concerns a method and system for reversing a payment method selection after a transaction has already been processed using a consolidated payment device associated...
items.ai_summary_zh: EPO 技术上诉委员会在 T 1327/22 号案件中裁定，利用整合支付设备在交易完成后撤销原支付方式并启用新方式，本质上属于金融安排而非技术贡献。若权利要求未限定超出通用计算机系统的具体技术实现手段，仅定义此类非技术需求不足以确立创造性，该特征在 inventive step 评估中不予考虑。
items.ai_summary_en: In decision T 1327/22, the EPO Technical Board of Appeal determined that reversing a payment method selection after transaction completion constitutes a financial arrangement rather than a technical contribution. The invention involved using a consolidated payment device to cancel an initial payment and authorize a second one. The Board held that defining such non-technical requirements without specifying technical implementation details beyond standard computer systems fails to establish inventive step. Consequently, this feature was excluded from the assessment of patentability under the problem-solution approach.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧申请涉及金融科技或支付流程的软专利时，应避免仅描述商业逻辑。必须将方案锚定于具体的技术架构改进或数据处理流程，明确区别于通用计算机的标准功能，以符合 EPO 对技术性的严格要求，降低被驳回风险。
items.ai_insight_en: For applicants in fintech and digital payments, purely commercial logic or business rules are insufficient for European patent protection. Claims must be anchored in concrete technical architecture improvements or specific data processing workflows. It is critical to clearly distinguish proprietary technical solutions from standard functions of generic computer systems. This approach ensures compliance with the EPO’s strict technicality requirements, thereby reducing the risk of rejection during examination and strengthening the validity of granted patents in the European market.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["交易后退款并重充属金融安排，不构成技术贡献", "未限定具体技术实现的非技术需求无法确立创造性", "EPO 上诉委强调软件专利需具备实质技术实施手段"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Post-transaction refunds and re-charges are classified as financial arrangements lacking technical character.", "Non-technical requirements without specific technical implementations cannot support an inventive step.", "EPO emphasizes that software patents require substantive technical implementation measures."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["避免纯商业逻辑描述，须锚定具体技术架构改进", "明确区分通用计算功能与特有技术实施手段"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Fintech applicants must anchor claims in technical architecture rather than pure business logic.", "Practice note: Clearly differentiate proprietary technical implementations from standard generic computing functions.", "What to monitor: EPO scrutiny regarding the technical character of payment processing methods and software features."]
core_points_en: Post-transaction refunds and re-charges are classified as financial arrangements lacking technical character.
Non-technical requirements without specific technical implementations cannot support an inventive step.
EPO emphasizes that software patents require substantive technical implementation measures.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Fintech applicants must anchor claims in technical architecture rather than pure business logic.
Practice note: Clearly differentiate proprietary technical implementations from standard generic computing functions.
What to monitor: EPO scrutiny regarding the technical character of payment processing methods and software features.

items.title: Successful conclusion of second convergence of practice cycle
items.title_zh: EPO 成功完成第二轮专利审查实践趋同周期
items.title_en: EPO Concludes Second Practice Convergence Cycle with New Guidelines on Broad Claims and Double Patenting
items.summary: The EPO has completed the second Convergence of Practice cycle with new common practices on Broad Claims and Double Patenting, strengthening alignment and legal certainty across the patent network.
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局（EPO）宣布完成第二轮“实践趋同”计划，正式采纳关于“宽泛权利要求”和“重复专利”的共同实践准则。此举旨在统一欧洲专利网络内的审查标准，减少各国差异，提升法律确定性。新规则明确了过度宽泛权利要求的处理框架及重复专利异议的信息披露要求，为申请人提供更可预测的审查环境。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Patent Office has successfully completed the second cycle of its Convergence of Practice programme, adopting new common practices regarding broad claims and double patenting. This initiative, a cornerstone of the Strategic Plan 2028, aims to strengthen alignment across the European Patent Network and reduce divergences among national offices. The new framework provides clear procedural options for handling overly broad claims during the search phase and clarifies the information examiners must include when issuing double patenting objections. By promoting consistent practices, the EPO enhances legal certainty for users and improves synergies between first and second filing procedures. These developments result from close cooperation between the EPO, national patent offices, user associations, and WIPO, ensuring a more predictable and harmonized approach for applicants across all EPC contracting states.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧专利申请需关注审查标准趋同，避免因权利要求过宽或重复布局被驳回。建议提前研判新指南，优化撰写策略以适配统一审查口径，降低合规风险。
items.ai_insight_en: The adoption of these common practices significantly impacts prosecution strategy within the European Patent Network. Applicants should anticipate stricter scrutiny of claim scope during the search phase and ensure robust differentiation in cases involving multiple filings. Understanding the clarified standards for double patenting objections allows for more effective responses and proactive portfolio management. As national offices implement these guidelines, consistency in examination outcomes is expected to improve, reducing the risk of unexpected rejections due to procedural divergences. Stakeholders should review current drafting protocols to align with the new definitions of overly broad claims and prepare for upcoming changes related to divisional applications and internet disclosures.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["EPO 采纳宽泛权利要求与重复专利两项共同实践准则", "新框架旨在统一审查标准，增强欧洲专利网络法律确定性", "第三轮工作已启动，聚焦分案申请与互联网披露议题"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The EPO adopted new common practices addressing broad claims and double patenting, concluding the second convergence cycle.", "New guidelines establish a framework for handling overly broad claims and clarify examiner obligations for double patenting objections.", "The third work cycle has commenced, focusing on divisional applications and internet disclosures to further harmonize practices."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注宽泛权利要求新界定，优化专利撰写以避免审查障碍", "利用趋同红利预判审查走向，提升在欧洲各国的获权效率"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Enhanced legal certainty reduces unpredictability in grant rates and streamlines cross-border patent enforcement strategies.", "Practice note: Review claim drafting protocols to address the new framework for overly broad claims and ensure clear differentiation in multi-filing scenarios.", "What to monitor: Implementation progress via the Convergence Dashboard and emerging guidelines on divisional applications and internet disclosures."]
core_points_en: The EPO adopted new common practices addressing broad claims and double patenting, concluding the second convergence cycle.
New guidelines establish a framework for handling overly broad claims and clarify examiner obligations for double patenting objections.
The third work cycle has commenced, focusing on divisional applications and internet disclosures to further harmonize practices.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Enhanced legal certainty reduces unpredictability in grant rates and streamlines cross-border patent enforcement strategies.
Practice note: Review claim drafting protocols to address the new framework for overly broad claims and ensure clear differentiation in multi-filing scenarios.
What to monitor: Implementation progress via the Convergence Dashboard and emerging guidelines on divisional applications and internet disclosures.

items.title: Results of EQE paper F 2026 available
items.title_zh: 2026 年欧洲专利代理人资格考试 F 卷成绩公布
items.title_en: EPO Releases 2026 EQE Paper F Results as Modular Reform Transition Concludes
items.summary: Less than two weeks after the European Qualifying Examination (EQE) 2026 session concluded on 12 March 2026, the results of paper F have been distributed to around 650 candidates.
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局公布 2026 年 EQE 基础卷（F 卷）成绩，约 650 名考生参试，通过率约 84%。作为考试模块化改革的关键一步，今年首次引入 M1/M2 卷并保留旧制试卷，标志着过渡期顺利完成。全数字化考试提升了效率，新架构旨在增强专利体系的包容性与可持续性，考生可按阶段评估能力并进阶。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Patent Office has distributed results for the 2026 European Qualifying Examination (EQE) Paper F to approximately 650 candidates. The foundation paper, assessing procedural patent law and claim analysis, achieved a pass rate of roughly 84%, with over 530 successful candidates. This outcome highlights the efficiency of the fully digital examination system introduced in 2021. The 2026 session marked a significant milestone, serving as the final year for legacy papers while introducing new modules M1 and M2. This progressive structural reform aims to enhance quality, accessibility, and sustainability within the European patent system. By allowing candidates to validate foundational skills early, the new modular design supports better pacing and readiness assessment before advancing to complex main modules, ensuring a robust pipeline of qualified professional representatives.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧布局需关注代理人资质新规，模块化考试可能改变服务供给节奏。建议提前规划专利代理合作，利用早期模块评估潜在合作伙伴能力，确保在欧知识产权事务由具备最新资质的专业人士处理，以应对更严格的执业标准。
items.ai_insight_en: The transition to a fully modular EQE structure significantly impacts the supply dynamics of European patent representation services. As the examination framework evolves to emphasize staged competency validation, firms and corporate counsel should consider how these changes affect the availability and specialization of patent attorneys. The new system allows for earlier verification of foundational legal and analytical skills, potentially altering recruitment timelines and service delivery models. Stakeholders must adapt to ensure their external partners possess credentials aligned with the updated regulatory standards, maintaining high-quality representation amidst evolving professional requirements.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["F 卷测试程序法与权利要求分析，超 530 人通过，体现数字化考试高效性", "年为旧制试卷最后一年，M1/M2 首考标志模块化改革过渡成功", "新架构允许考生分阶段参考，2027 年将全面实施全新模块化考试体系"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Paper F tests declarative knowledge of procedural law and claim analysis, achieving an approximate eighty-four percent pass rate among six hundred fifty candidates.", "The 2026 session concluded the transitional phase by offering legacy papers alongside new modules M1 and M2, marking a historic shift in examination structure.", "The reformed modular EQE enables early capability benchmarking, with full implementation of all new modules scheduled for completion in 2027."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注考试改革对欧洲专利代理服务市场供给与专业分工的潜在影响", "建议依据新模块标准筛选代理人，确保其具备分阶段验证的专业能力"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Monitor shifts in patent attorney availability and specialization resulting from the new modular qualification pathway.", "Practice note: Evaluate potential service providers based on their success in the new modular exams to verify foundational and advanced competencies.", "What to monitor: The complete rollout of modules M3 and M4 in 2027 and its impact on professional certification timelines across Europe."]
core_points_en: Paper F tests declarative knowledge of procedural law and claim analysis, achieving an approximate eighty-four percent pass rate among six hundred fifty candidates.
The 2026 session concluded the transitional phase by offering legacy papers alongside new modules M1 and M2, marking a historic shift in examination structure.
The reformed modular EQE enables early capability benchmarking, with full implementation of all new modules scheduled for completion in 2027.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Monitor shifts in patent attorney availability and specialization resulting from the new modular qualification pathway.
Practice note: Evaluate potential service providers based on their success in the new modular exams to verify foundational and advanced competencies.
What to monitor: The complete rollout of modules M3 and M4 in 2027 and its impact on professional certification timelines across Europe.

items.title: CD Munich, March 24, 2026, Procedural Order, UPC_CFI_2296/2025
items.title_zh: UPC 慕尼黑裁定：初步异议范围穷尽且不含诉讼资格抗辩
items.title_en: UPC Munich Confirms Rule 19.1 Preliminary Objections Are Exhaustive and Excludes Standing
items.summary: The court confirmed, in line with the Court of Appeal’s decisions in Aylo v. DISH/SLING (UPC_CoA_188/2024) and Roku/Sun (UPC_CoA_288/2025)...
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院慕尼黑中央分部作出程序令，确认规则 19.1 所列初步异议清单具有穷尽性，排除诉讼资格缺失或既判力等实体抗辩。法院指出此类问题需经事实评估，不属“明显”不可受理情形，应合并审理以提升程序效率，避免单独听证。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court’s Central Division in Munich issued a procedural order confirming that the list of preliminary objections under Rule 19.1 of the Rules of Procedure is exhaustive. The court held that this rule strictly limits preliminary challenges to issues of jurisdiction, divisional competence, and language. Defenses such as lack of standing or res judicata are substantive matters that cannot be raised as preliminary objections. Consequently, the defendant’s attempt to challenge the claimant’s standing and the effect of a prior national decision was rejected at this stage. The court emphasized that these issues require factual assessment and do not meet the 'manifest' inadmissibility threshold for anticipatory orders. To ensure procedural efficiency, the court ordered a single hearing on both admissibility and merits, avoiding separate preliminary hearings.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在 UPC 应诉时，不宜将诉讼资格等实体问题作为初步异议提出，以免被驳回并浪费程序机会。应聚焦管辖权等法定异议点，并准备在实质审理阶段充分举证经济利益关联，以应对资格挑战。
items.ai_insight_en: Practitioners must strictly distinguish between procedural admissibility and substantive validity when formulating defense strategies before the UPC. Attempting to raise substantive issues like standing or res judicata as preliminary objections under Rule 19.1 will likely result in dismissal. Instead, parties should focus preliminary efforts on jurisdictional grounds. For standing challenges, it is critical to prepare comprehensive evidence regarding economic interests and corporate structures early in the proceedings. This ensures robust arguments are ready for the main merits hearing, where such substantive defenses are properly evaluated, thereby avoiding procedural delays and wasted resources.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["规则 19.1 初步异议仅限管辖权、分庭能力及语言，不得扩展至实体抗辩", "诉讼资格与既判力涉及事实审查，不符合规则 361/362 条“明显”不可受理标准", "基于程序经济原则，法院拒绝就可受理性举行单独听证，主张合并审理"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Rule 19.1 preliminary objections are limited strictly to jurisdiction, divisional competence, and language, excluding substantive defenses like standing.", "Lack of standing and res judicata require factual evidence review, failing the 'manifest' inadmissibility standard for Rules 361 and 362.", "Procedural economy favors a combined hearing on admissibility and merits rather than separate preliminary hearings on standing issues."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["初步异议策略需严格限定于管辖权等法定事由，避免混同实体抗辩", "针对诉讼资格质疑，应提前梳理子公司股权链条及经济利益证据以备实质审理"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Parties should avoid raising substantive defenses like standing as preliminary objections to prevent procedural rejection and delay.", "Practice note: Prepare detailed evidence on corporate links and economic interest early to address standing challenges during the merits phase.", "What to monitor: Monitor upcoming Court of Appeal decisions on res judicata to refine strategies for future consolidated hearings."]
core_points_en: Rule 19.1 preliminary objections are limited strictly to jurisdiction, divisional competence, and language, excluding substantive defenses like standing.
Lack of standing and res judicata require factual evidence review, failing the 'manifest' inadmissibility standard for Rules 361 and 362.
Procedural economy favors a combined hearing on admissibility and merits rather than separate preliminary hearings on standing issues.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Parties should avoid raising substantive defenses like standing as preliminary objections to prevent procedural rejection and delay.
Practice note: Prepare detailed evidence on corporate links and economic interest early to address standing challenges during the merits phase.
What to monitor: Monitor upcoming Court of Appeal decisions on res judicata to refine strategies for future consolidated hearings.

items.title: UPC: Litigation Insurance Relevant to Security for Costs – Syntorr v Arthrex | EIP
items.title_zh: UPC 上诉院：诉讼保险应纳入费用担保考量
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal: Litigation Insurance Must Be Considered in Security for Costs Decisions
items.summary: The UPC Court of Appeal holds that litigation insurance must be considered when deciding whether to order security for costs, overturning the Munich Local Division.
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC 上诉院在 Syntorr 诉 Arthrex 案中推翻慕尼黑地方分院裁定，确立诉讼保险政策是决定是否命令提供费用担保时必须考虑的因素。法院指出，虽然规则未直接将保险列为担保形式，但在评估原告财务状况及被告成本回收风险时，必须将保险作为自由裁量的重要依据，修正了此前仅接受存款或银行担保的狭隘观点。
items.ai_summary_en: The UPC Court of Appeal has overturned a Munich Local Division ruling, establishing that litigation insurance policies are a relevant factor when determining whether to order security for costs. In Syntorr v Arthrex, the Local Division had ordered €2 million in security via deposit or bank guarantee, excluding insurance as a valid form under Rule 158.1 RoP. The Court of Appeal clarified that while Rule 158.1 specifies deposit or bank guarantee for the actual provision of security if awarded, the initial discretionary decision under Article 69(4) UPCA requires assessing the claimant’s financial position and the risk of cost recovery. Consequently, the existence of litigation insurance must be considered when evaluating whether there is a legitimate concern regarding the enforceability of a potential costs order, correcting the previous narrow interpretation.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧涉诉时应积极利用诉讼保险降低被责令高额现金担保的风险。需提前规划保险方案，将其作为应对对方费用担保申请的核心抗辩理由，优化资金流动性并提升诉讼防御能力。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment significantly impacts litigation strategy before the Unified Patent Court by broadening the scope of factors considered in security for costs applications. Parties facing such requests can now leverage existing litigation insurance policies to demonstrate sufficient financial backing, potentially avoiding burdensome cash deposits or bank guarantees that strain liquidity. Legal teams should proactively integrate insurance coverage details into their responses to security applications. This approach not only mitigates immediate financial pressure but also strengthens the overall defense posture by addressing the court's concerns about cost recoverability through documented insurance mechanisms rather than solely relying on corporate balance sheets.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["上诉院认定诉讼保险是评估费用担保必要性的关键因素", "推翻慕尼黑分院拒绝将保险纳入考量的原审裁定", "明确法院在行使自由裁量权时需综合评估财务风险"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The Court of Appeal ruled that litigation insurance is a key factor in assessing the necessity of ordering security for costs.", "It overturned the Munich Local Division's decision which previously excluded insurance from consideration in such assessments.", "Courts must comprehensively evaluate financial risks and cost recovery likelihood when exercising discretion under Article 69(4)."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用诉讼保险抗辩高额费用担保请求，缓解资金压力", "提前布局保险策略，增强在 UPC 诉讼中的财务防御力"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Use litigation insurance to counter high security for costs demands, preserving operational cash flow during proceedings.", "Practice note: Proactively structure insurance coverage to serve as primary evidence of financial reliability in UPC cost disputes.", "What to monitor: Future Court of Appeal decisions clarifying the weight given to insurance versus traditional security forms."]
core_points_en: The Court of Appeal ruled that litigation insurance is a key factor in assessing the necessity of ordering security for costs.
It overturned the Munich Local Division's decision which previously excluded insurance from consideration in such assessments.
Courts must comprehensively evaluate financial risks and cost recovery likelihood when exercising discretion under Article 69(4).
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Use litigation insurance to counter high security for costs demands, preserving operational cash flow during proceedings.
Practice note: Proactively structure insurance coverage to serve as primary evidence of financial reliability in UPC cost disputes.
What to monitor: Future Court of Appeal decisions clarifying the weight given to insurance versus traditional security forms.

items.title: Wanneer wordt een bewegingsmerk geweigerd wegens technische functionaliteit?
items.title_zh: 欧盟法院裁定：纯技术功能动态商标将被驳回
items.title_en: EU General Court Rejects Motion Mark for Hinged Window Due to Technical Functionality
items.summary: In January 2026, the General Court of the EU refused the application for a motion mark of a hinged window. The General Court considers that the movement consists only of a technical functional process.
items.ai_summary_zh: 2026 年 1 月，欧盟普通法院维持 EUIPO 决定，驳回德国 Kct 公司关于折叠窗开合动画的动态商标注册申请。法院认定该运动序列仅由技术功能过程组成，缺乏显著性且属于《欧盟商标条例》禁止注册的技术解决方案范畴，旨在防止通过商标权无限期垄断技术特征。
items.ai_summary_en: In January 2026, the General Court of the European Union upheld the EUIPO’s decision to refuse registration of a motion mark filed by German company Kct GmbH & Co. The application depicted an animation of a hinged window opening and closing. The Court determined that this movement sequence consisted exclusively of technical functional processes, thereby lacking inherent distinctiveness. Crucially, the mark fell within the scope of Article 7(1)(e)(ii) of the EU Trade Mark Regulation, which prohibits the registration of signs consisting solely of shapes or characteristics necessary to obtain a technical result. This legal provision aims to prevent companies from securing indefinite monopolies on technical solutions through trademark law, effectively extending the protection period beyond that of patents. Consequently, the Court confirmed that such purely functional animations cannot be registered as trademarks.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: Applicants seeking to register motion marks in the EU must ensure their submissions transcend mere descriptions of technical mechanisms. Purely functional animations depicting standard operational movements are likely to face refusal based on technical functionality grounds. To enhance distinctiveness and mitigate rejection risks, it is advisable to incorporate unique, non-functional visual elements into the design. These may include specific color combinations, artistic stylizations, or distinctive deformations that do not serve a technical purpose. By integrating such aesthetic features, brands can better demonstrate that the mark serves as an indicator of origin rather than just a technical process, aligning with current judicial interpretations regarding the separation of function and brand identity.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["动态商标若仅展示产品技术运作过程，将被视为缺乏显著性", "欧盟法律禁止注册仅为获取技术结果所必需的形状或特征", "法院强调需区分功能性要素与装饰性要素以判定可注册性"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Motion marks displaying only product technical operations are deemed to lack distinctiveness under EU trademark law.", "EU legislation explicitly bans registering shapes or features strictly necessary to achieve a specific technical result.", "Courts emphasize distinguishing between functional elements and decorative aspects when assessing registrability."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["避免申请仅描述产品技术运作流程的纯功能性动态商标", "在设计中增加非功能性装饰元素以提升商标显著特征"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Avoid filing motion marks that merely describe standard product technical workflows to prevent automatic rejection.", "Practice note: Integrate non-functional decorative elements into animation designs to strengthen trademark distinctiveness.", "What to monitor: Judicial trends in distinguishing technical functionality from aesthetic branding in motion mark cases."]
core_points_en: Motion marks displaying only product technical operations are deemed to lack distinctiveness under EU trademark law.
EU legislation explicitly bans registering shapes or features strictly necessary to achieve a specific technical result.
Courts emphasize distinguishing between functional elements and decorative aspects when assessing registrability.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Avoid filing motion marks that merely describe standard product technical workflows to prevent automatic rejection.
Practice note: Integrate non-functional decorative elements into animation designs to strengthen trademark distinctiveness.
What to monitor: Judicial trends in distinguishing technical functionality from aesthetic branding in motion mark cases.
